name: Sydney TMS
description_long: Sydney TMS clinics provide treatment in an outpatient setting, avoiding the need for patient hospitalisation. The outpatient experience creates a more personalised experience with less interruption to everyday life. TMS is a well tolerated treatment, particularly for those who found medications difficult to use. At Sydney TMS we are constantly monitoring TMS protocols both in Australia and Internationally to offer the most up-to-date treatments available. Our clinics regularly share knowledge and information with other TMS providers around Australia through the Royal College of Australian and New Zealand College of Psychiatrists network.

additional_locations.address: The Vue, Suite 2 (ground level), 1 Centennial Drive

doctors_data.name: Dr Jason Pace
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist & Medical Director
doctors_data.university: Royal Australian and New Zealand College of Psychiatrists
doctors_data.bio: Dr Jason Pace is dedicated to providing the most up to date treatment methods for those people with depression. He takes pride in providing the most professional service to all patients who receive treatment. It is Dr Pace's aim to work with a patient's current treating health professional to achieve the best outcomes.

name: NeuroCentrix
description_long: NeuroCentrix is a dedicated neuroscience group providing various mental health services. Evidence-based assessment, TMS treatment and research. The clinic offers out-patient consulting in psychiatry, psychology, and cardiac psychology, as well as access to research and clinical trials in depression, Alzheimer's disease and dementia. TMS treatment for depression typically consists of 20 to 35 sessions delivered as an outpatient over 3 to 6 weeks.

doctors_data.name: Professor David Barton
doctors_data.title: Founding Director & Psychiatrist
doctors_data.university: Royal Australian and New Zealand College of Psychiatrists
doctors_data.bio: Professor David Barton is the founding director of NeuroCentrix, leading the organisation's commitment to evidence-based neuroscience services and innovative mental health treatments.

doctors_data.name: Dr Arup Dhar
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.university: Royal College of Psychiatrists UK, Royal Australian and New Zealand College of Psychiatrists
doctors_data.bio: Dr Arup Dhar is a Scottish-born psychiatrist with specialist training from the Royal College of Psychiatry UK and fellowship to the Royal Australian and New Zealand College of Psychiatrists.

doctors_data.name: Dr Timothy Hender
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist & Psychogeriatrician
doctors_data.university: Royal Australian and New Zealand College of Psychiatrists
doctors_data.bio: Dr Timothy Hender is a Psychiatrist and Psychogeriatrician and Fellow of the Royal Australian and New Zealand College of Psychiatrists.

name: Monarch Mental Health Group (MMHG) - Sydney
description_long: Monarch Mental Health Group is a psychiatrist-led Australian mental health care provider offering early access to innovative next-step services for depression, anxiety, and related mental health conditions. Founded in 2017 as TMS Clinics Australia by Dr Ted Cassidy and Professor Paul Fitzgerald, MMHG is recognised as Australia's first outpatient clinic offering assisted therapy and is the largest provider of outpatient magnetic stimulation therapy, among other advanced treatments.

doctors_data.name: Dr Ted Cassidy
doctors_data.title: Co-founder, Executive Chair & Chief Medical Officer
doctors_data.university: Royal Australian and New Zealand College of Psychiatrists
doctors_data.bio: Dr Ted Cassidy is Co-founder, Executive Chair of the Board and Chief Medical Officer of Monarch Mental Health Group. He has been delivering innovative mental health treatment services for over 20 years, including TMS, and has worked extensively since 2014 in the field of developing next-step mental health treatments.

doctors_data.name: Professor Paul Fitzgerald
doctors_data.title: Co-founder & Director, Monarch Research Institute
doctors_data.bio: Professor Paul Fitzgerald is an internationally recognised expert in novel treatments for mental health treatments including the use of TMS. He is Co-founder of Monarch Mental Health Group and Director of the Monarch Research Institute.

name: Monarch Mental Health Group (MMHG) - Melbourne
description_long: Monarch Mental Health Group provides comprehensive and personalised mental health services in Melbourne. The dedicated team supports patients with innovative treatments and compassionate care including rTMS, dTMS and tDCS, alongside psychological therapy and psychiatry services tailored to unique needs.
address: Coates Building, Suite 1, Level 4, 20 Collins Street

doctors_data.name: Dr Anish Modak
doctors_data.title: Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr Anish Modak completed his undergraduate medical degree and Master of Psychiatry at the University of Melbourne and is a fellow of the Royal Australian and New Zealand College of Psychiatrists.

doctors_data.name: Dr Grace Chan
doctors_data.title: Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.university: Royal Australian and New Zealand College of Psychiatrists
doctors_data.bio: Dr Grace Chan is a consultant psychiatrist at The Monarch Clinic and in private practice in Melbourne.

name: neurocare clinics Australia - Sydney
description_long: neurocare clinics Australia is part of a global network of best-practice neuromodulation centers, offering highly personalised and innovative solutions for depression, ADHD, sleep and more. The clinic assists new and existing clients of all ages, with access to an expert team of Psychiatry and Psychology staff, and clients can access Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS), Neurofeedback, and tDCS.
address: Suite 4, Building 7, 49 Frenchs Forest Road East

doctors_data.name: Dr Lidbury
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.university: Royal Australian and New Zealand College of Psychiatrists
doctors_data.bio: Dr Lidbury is a Psychiatrist with a special interest in helping patients with substance use disorders and addictions as well as trauma, anxiety and mood disorders.

name: Cingulum Health
description_long: Cingulum Health brings together an exceptional, multi-disciplinary team of specialists, functional physicians, allied health practitioners, and therapists to provide comprehensive care for the treatment of all brain-related disorders. Established in 2019 as the first flagship clinic in the heart of Sydney, Cingulum offers personalised, connectome-guided TMS treatment to unlock new pathways to live.

doctors_data.name: Professor Charlie Teo AM
doctors_data.title: Founder & Neurosurgeon
doctors_data.bio: Professor Charlie Teo AM is an internationally renowned neurosurgeon, innovator, and founder of Cingulum Health who has dedicated over 40 years to advancing the field of brain surgery.

doctors_data.name: Dr Mark Ryan
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.university: University of Sydney, University of New South Wales
doctors_data.bio: Mark Ryan is a psychiatrist with an extensive background in consultation-liaison psychiatry, precision medicine and neuromodulation. He has served as Clinical Lecturer at both Sydney University and the University of NSW.

doctors_data.name: Dr Olivia Ly Lesslar
doctors_data.title: Physician
doctors_data.bio: Dr Olivia Ly Lesslar is Australian-educated and has completed postgraduate studies in skin cancer medicine and clinical nutrition management, and is currently undertaking a Diploma in Clinical Hypnosis and Strategic Psychotherapy.

name: Mind Oasis Clinic
description_long: Mind Oasis Clinic offers evidence-based TMS therapy treatment as part of personalised mental health services with in-person Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation in Sydney and telehealth care Australia-wide. Trusted by over 40,000 GPs and patients, the clinic has a team of 20+ expert psychiatrists who are fully licensed and accredited by the Royal Australian and New Zealand College of Psychiatrists (RANZCP).
address: Suite 3, Level 3, Strathfield Plaza, 11 The Boulevarde

name: The Melbourne Clinic
description_long: The Melbourne Clinic offers Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) therapy with treatment sessions lasting between 30 and 40 minutes. As a private mental health hospital, The Melbourne Clinic provides comprehensive psychiatric and mental health services including TMS as a specialised treatment for depression and other conditions.

name: Neuralia TMS Perth
description_long: Neuralia TMS is a TMS service offering bulk billed Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation to mental health patients in Perth and regional Western Australia. The clinic provides drug-free depression treatment with convenient clinic locations across Perth.

doctors_data.name: Dr Shanek Wick
doctors_data.title: Medical Director
doctors_data.bio: Dr Shanek Wick serves as Medical Director of Neuralia TMS, leading the clinic's commitment to providing accessible, bulk-billed TMS treatment across Perth and regional Western Australia.

doctors_data.name: Dr Riti Chetty
doctors_data.title: Specialist Physician-in-Training
doctors_data.bio: Dr Riti Chetty is a specialist physician-in-training who manages service delivery at Neuralia TMS and liaises with staff, partners and the public.

name: Modalis TMS
description_long: Modalis is the leading provider of Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) in WA and SA, offering non-invasive MRI-guided Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) that can improve treatment options for many conditions, including depression, OCD, PTSD, pain management, and tinnitus. Modalis partners with multiple healthcare facilities across the Perth metropolitan region and Adelaide.
address: 20 Ivory Way, Bertram Family Medical Centre

name: The Sherpah Clinic
description_long: The Sherpah Clinic provides Medicare bulk billed rTMS, ADHD neurofeedback and integrative mental health support in West Perth. The clinic delivers Medicare bulk billed rTMS for treatment-resistant depression, PTSD, OCD, chronic pain and ADHD.

name: TMS Auckland
description_long: TMS Auckland is a specialist clinic offering Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) for people living with treatment-resistant depression. Located in Ponsonby, Auckland, the clinic has treated approximately 200 patients with difficult-to-treat depression since 2019. They use a state-of-the-art protocol that reduces the duration of each session and the number of sessions needed, resulting in a more convenient and cost-effective treatment.

doctors_data.name: Dr Rob Shieff
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.university: Royal Australian and New Zealand College of Psychiatrists
doctors_data.bio: Dr Rob Shieff is a psychiatrist and TMS specialist who has been providing TMS treatment since 2019 at TMS Auckland.

doctors_data.name: Dr Ian Goodwin
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.university: Royal Australian and New Zealand College of Psychiatrists
doctors_data.bio: Dr Ian Goodwin is a psychiatrist at TMS Auckland with many years of combined experience in psychiatry and mental health.

doctors_data.name: Dorothy Lami
doctors_data.title: TMS Practitioner
doctors_data.bio: Dorothy Lami is a TMS Practitioner at TMS Auckland, delivering TMS treatments to patients.

name: Advance Aotearoa
description_long: Advance Aotearoa is Auckland's specialist TMS and Ketamine psychiatric clinic, offering personalised psychiatric assessments and the latest treatments for depression, anxiety and OCD. They are the only clinic in New Zealand currently offering TMS treatment specifically for OCD, and they offer iTBS (an accelerated form of TMS) as well as traditional rTMS and cTBS protocols. The clinic works closely with public health teams including Waitemata Community Mental Health Centre.

doctors_data.name: Dr Stefano Cali
doctors_data.title: Chief Medical Officer & Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.university: Auckland Hospital, Royal Australian and New Zealand College of Psychiatrists
doctors_data.bio: Dr Stefano Cali is the Chief Medical Officer at Advance Aotearoa and a Consultant Psychiatrist at Auckland Hospital Inpatient Unit. He leads the clinic's innovative TMS and ketamine therapy programmes.

name: Healing Minds
description_long: Healing Minds is a leading mental health clinic in Milford, Auckland, and the TMS pioneers in New Zealand. Led by Dr Rui Mendel, a compassionate and experienced psychiatrist with over 30 years experience in the industry, Healing Minds has been providing TMS since 2006 and offers TMS therapy for various conditions including depression and anxiety.

doctors_data.name: Dr Rui Mendel
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist & Founder
doctors_data.university: Royal Australian and New Zealand College of Psychiatrists
doctors_data.bio: Dr Rui Mendel is a compassionate and experienced psychiatrist with over 30 years experience in the industry. He is the TMS pioneer in New Zealand, having provided TMS treatments since 2006.

name: Better Mental Health TMS
description_long: Better Mental Health TMS is a New Zealand clinic providing Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation therapy. Led by Dr Darren Malone, a Consultant Psychiatrist and Psychogeriatrician, the clinic offers TMS treatment for depression and other mental health conditions.

doctors_data.name: Dr Darren Malone
doctors_data.title: Consultant Psychiatrist & Psychogeriatrician
doctors_data.bio: Dr Darren Malone is a Consultant Psychiatrist and Psychogeriatrician. He has worked in private practice since 2008, conducting medicolegal and capacity assessments, assessment for third parties (ACC) and GP referrals.

name: Vitalis Health
description_long: Vitalis Health offers transcranial direct current stimulation and TMS therapy in New Zealand, providing non-invasive brain stimulation treatments for mental health conditions.

name: Centro Brasileiro de Estimulacao Magnetica Transcraniana (CBrEMT)
description_long: Founded in 2000, CBrEMT was the first clinical center in Brazil to use Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS/EMT). Offering non-invasive, painless treatment without medications, the center specializes in treating depression, bipolar disorder, anxiety, OCD, insomnia, eating disorders, fibromyalgia, and stroke rehabilitation. Treatment costs are among the most affordable worldwide at approximately US$2,000 per full course.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Marco Antonio Marcolin
doctors_data.title: Medical Director
doctors_data.bio: Pioneer in clinical TMS in Brazil. Founded CBrEMT in 2000 as the first TMS center in the country. Specialist in neuromodulation and psychiatric treatment.

name: Clinica Regenerati
description_long: Clinica Regenerati is a neurology clinic located in Moema, Sao Paulo, offering a comprehensive range of neurological services including Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (EMT). The technique generates electrical potentials in neurons through which the magnetic field passes, treating conditions such as depression, fibromyalgia, Parkinson's disease, chronic migraines, and neuropathic pain. The clinic operates Monday to Friday 8:00 AM to 7:00 PM and Saturday 8:00 AM to 12:00 PM.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Willian Rezende do Carmo
doctors_data.title: Medical Director - Neurologist
doctors_data.bio: Neurologist and founder of Clinica Regenerati, specializing in neurological disorders and neuromodulation therapies including transcranial magnetic stimulation.

name: Neurologia Integrada
description_long: Neurologia Integrada is a neurology practice in Bela Vista, Sao Paulo, offering Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) as part of its neurological treatment portfolio. The clinic specializes in motor recovery and rehabilitation after stroke, neuropathic pain management, and various neurological conditions. Led by Dr. Bruno Funchal, a neurologist trained at Escola Paulista de Medicina (UNIFESP) with a Master's degree in Neurology focusing on Vascular Neurology and Neurointensivism.
address: Rua Barata Ribeiro, 176, Conjunto 501/502, Bela Vista

doctors_data.name: Dr. Bruno Funchal
doctors_data.title: Neurologist
doctors_data.bio: Neurologist with a Master's degree in Neurology focusing on Vascular Neurology and Neurointensivism from UNIFESP. Specializes in TMS for motor recovery after stroke and neuropathic pain management.

name: DM Plus Clinica Neurologica
description_long: DM Plus is a neurological clinic of excellence located in Pinheiros, Sao Paulo, specializing in movement disorders, Parkinson's disease, tremors, dystonias, headaches, dementia, and neuromodulation. The clinic uses TMS carefully aligned with clear functional goals such as improving gait, balance, movement initiation, voice projection, and dual-task performance. The procedure takes place in an outpatient setting with trained staff and neurological coordination.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Rubens Cury
doctors_data.title: Neurologist - Movement Disorders Specialist
doctors_data.bio: Specialist in neuromodulation with techniques including TMS, tDCS, and DBS. Expert in movement disorders, Parkinson's disease, and neurological rehabilitation.

name: INCB - Instituto de Neurociencias de Brasilia
description_long: The Institute of Neurosciences of Brasilia (INCB) was created with the mission of integrating sciences dedicated to the study of behavior, cognition, emotions, and the nervous system, enabling multidisciplinary treatment of mental illness. The team includes psychiatrists, psychologists/neuropsychologists, endocrinologists, sexologists, and nutritionists. INCB offers Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (EMT), a non-drug, safe, and effective treatment for depression. They are pioneers in Brasilia in providing pharmacogenetic testing for personalized medication selection.
address: SGAS 610, Bloco 2, Salas 229, 230 e 231, Asa Sul

doctors_data.name: Dr. Alexandre Rozenwald
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Experienced psychiatrist at INCB specializing in mental health treatment and transcranial magnetic stimulation for depression and related disorders.

doctors_data.name: Dra. Beatriz Vieira
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Psychiatrist at INCB focusing on comprehensive mental health care including neuromodulation therapies.

doctors_data.name: Dra. Cristina Ferreira Pessoa
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Psychiatrist at INCB providing specialized mental health treatment and transcranial magnetic stimulation therapy.

name: Clinica Pacifico
description_long: Clinica Pacifico is an institute specializing in Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation and Psychiatry in Brasilia. Led by Dr. Roberto Querido Name Cardoso, a psychiatrist trained in TMS at Harvard Medical School and Hospital das Clinicas da Faculdade de Medicina da USP, the clinic offers cutting-edge EMT treatment using high-technology equipment with great precision targeting specific brain areas. The clinic also offers ketamine-based treatments.
address: SEPS 709/909 Sul, Centro Medico Julio Adnet, Bloco B, Sala 323, Asa Sul

doctors_data.name: Dr. Roberto Querido Name Cardoso
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist - Medical Director
doctors_data.university: Harvard Medical School; Hospital das Clinicas - FMUSP
doctors_data.bio: Psychiatrist with TMS training at Harvard Medical School in Massachusetts, USA, and at Hospital das Clinicas da Faculdade de Medicina da USP in Sao Paulo. Specialist in transcranial magnetic stimulation and advanced psychiatric treatments including ketamine therapy.

name: NEMO Neuromodulacao Cerebral
description_long: NEMO is a brain neuromodulation clinic focused on improving cerebral capacity through electrical and visual stimulation for treating neurological conditions. With its main office in Porto Alegre and additional locations in Londrina and Pato Branco, NEMO offers cutting-edge neuromodulation treatments. The team includes specialists trained at UFRGS (Universidade Federal do Rio Grande do Sul) and Harvard University, bringing advanced expertise in neurological rehabilitation.

doctors_data.name: Dra. Lauren Adachi
doctors_data.title: Physiotherapist, PhD
doctors_data.university: UFRGS (Mestrado e Doutorado); Harvard University (Neuromodulation); Instituto Scala
doctors_data.bio: Physiotherapist with Master's and Doctorate from the Laboratory of Neuromodulation at UFRGS. Completed Neuromodulation course at Instituto Scala and specialization in Clinical Research at Harvard University, USA. CREFITO-145.144-F.

doctors_data.name: Dra. Etiane Callai
doctors_data.title: Dental Surgeon, PhD
doctors_data.bio: Dental Surgeon with Master's and Doctorate from UFRGS. Researcher in the Neuroscience Studies group at the Faculty of Dentistry - UFRGS. Specializes in TMJ treatment and orofacial pain. CRO 13.526.

name: InsCer - Instituto do Cerebro do Rio Grande do Sul (PUCRS)
description_long: InsCer (Brain Institute of Rio Grande do Sul) at PUCRS is a leading research and clinical institution offering Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (EMT) for patients with major depression who have not responded to antidepressant medications. The institute features the Centro de Pesquisa Pre-Clinica (CPPC) and Centro de Pesquisa e Investigacao Clinica (Cepic). Sessions are conducted on consecutive weekdays (Monday through Friday), and a medical referral is required for scheduling.

name: Hospital Israelita Albert Einstein - Centro de Reabilitacao
description_long: Hospital Israelita Albert Einstein, one of Latin America's most prestigious medical institutions, has incorporated TMS (Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation) into its rehabilitation center. The application of TMS is supervised by specialists in neurology, physiatry, neurophysiology, and psychiatry, ensuring an evidence-based approach. The rehabilitation center performs an average of 11,000 appointments per month, with 60% for higher-complexity patients. TMS helps rehabilitate patients with depression, chronic pain, and motor sequelae from stroke.

doctors_data.name: Dra. Milene Ferreira
doctors_data.title: Medical Manager - Rehabilitation and Sports Medicine
doctors_data.bio: Medical Manager of Rehabilitation and Sports Medicine at Hospital Einstein, overseeing TMS integration into the rehabilitation center's neuromodulation services.

name: ROME Psiquiatria Integral
description_long: ROME Psiquiatria Integral is a mental health center certified by the Mexican Society of Neuromodulation, specializing in Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (EMT) in Mexico City. The clinic offers innovative treatment for people suffering from different mental disorders. Treatment includes a complete psychiatric or neurological diagnosis. Their team of specialists includes Dra. Cristina Rodriguez, Dra. Ariadne Hernandez, and Dr. Omar Medrano, all with extensive preparation in neuromodulation.
address: Manuel E. Izaguirre 11, Ciudad Satelite, Naucalpan / Gregorio V. Gelati No. 33, San Miguel Chapultepec, Miguel Hidalgo

doctors_data.name: Dra. Cristina Rodriguez
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Psychiatrist at ROME Psiquiatria Integral specializing in transcranial magnetic stimulation for mental health disorders. Certified by the Mexican Society of Neuromodulation.

doctors_data.name: Dra. Ariadne Hernandez
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Specialist in neuromodulation and psychiatric treatment at ROME Psiquiatria Integral in Mexico City.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Omar Medrano
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Psychiatrist at ROME Psiquiatria Integral with expertise in transcranial magnetic stimulation and mental health treatment. Highly recommended by patients for professional care.

name: Neurowave
description_long: Neurowave is a specialized center in Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (EMT) located in the prestigious Lomas de Chapultepec neighborhood of Mexico City. EMT is a non-invasive brain stimulation technique used for treatment of mental disorders such as depression, generalized anxiety, post-traumatic stress, obsessive-compulsive disorder, and other conditions. The center offers safe and effective treatment to improve wellbeing.
address: Calle Montes Urales 749, Interior 5, Col. Lomas de Chapultepec

name: Cisne Mexico - Centro de Investigacion del Sistema Nervioso
description_long: Cisne Mexico (Centro de Investigacion del Sistema Nervioso) is a high-specialty clinic focused on mental health care, offering cutting-edge psychiatric treatments including Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS). The center treats conditions such as depression, anxiety, ADHD, OCD, bipolar disorder, PTSD, schizophrenia, insomnia, cognitive decline, dementia, and suicidal behavior. Cisne provides both in-person and virtual consultations.

name: Grupo Medico Carracci
description_long: Grupo Medico Carracci is a leader in psychology and psychiatry in Mexico, offering Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation as part of their comprehensive mental health services. The center specializes in OCD, Bipolar Disorder, Suicidal Behavior, Attention and Memory, Anxiety, Schizophrenia, Alzheimer's, Dementia, PTSD, Social Phobia, and Insomnia. Led by Dr. Jose Humberto Nicolini Sanchez, a physician certified by the Mexican Council of Psychiatry.
address: Luis Carracci 107, Extremadura Insurgentes, Benito Juarez

doctors_data.name: Dr. Jose Humberto Nicolini Sanchez
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist - Medical Director
doctors_data.university: Certified by Mexican Council of Psychiatry
doctors_data.bio: Leading psychiatrist and medical director of Grupo Medico Carracci, certified by the Mexican Council of Psychiatry. Expert in neuromodulation and TMS treatment for psychiatric conditions.

name: Centro Medico ABC - Estimulacion Magnetica Transcraneal
description_long: Centro Medico ABC (American British Cowdray Medical Center) is one of Mexico's most prestigious private hospitals, offering Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation as a non-invasive procedure to stimulate the cerebral cortex for treating various neuropsychiatric diseases and disorders. The process involves placing an electromagnetic coil on the scalp and emitting painless magnetic pulses to stimulate neurons in brain regions that control mood. Treats conditions including postpartum depression, neuropathic pain, and schizophrenia.
address: Sur 136 No. 116, Col. Las Americas, Alvaro Obregon

name: Neurocenter Monterrey
description_long: Neurocenter Monterrey is a specialized neurology and neurorehabilitation center offering state-of-the-art repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (rTMS) treatment. Their equipment is FDA and COFEPRIS approved, guaranteeing effective and safe treatment. The typical protocol consists of 20 to 30 sessions lasting approximately 30 to 45 minutes each, with a frequency of 3 to 5 times per week depending on diagnosis. The center treats treatment-resistant depression, neuropathic pain, chronic migraine, addictions, epilepsy, and insomnia.

name: BS Center - Estimulacion Magnetica Transcraneal
description_long: BS Center offers cutting-edge Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation therapies using Low-Intensity repetitive TMS (LI-rTMS) and Pulsed Electromagnetic Fields (PEMF) to help patients improve their health and quality of life. Inaugurated in August 2018, BS Center has treated many patients with diverse conditions with excellent results. The center uses advanced technology to deliver personalized neuromodulation treatments.

name: NeuroSpa Clinic
description_long: NeuroSpa Clinic is the first clinic in Ciudad Juarez to offer high-frequency EEG-guided TMS, integrating both concurrent and subsequent therapies to optimize how the brain responds to stimulation. Led by clinical neuropsychologist Dr. Veronica Portillo Reyes, the clinic provides advanced non-invasive therapies for individuals of all ages. Their integral approach includes neuropsychological evaluations to identify conditions such as depression, anxiety, OCD, ADHD, PTSD, autism, cognitive decline, and dementia. They combine TMS with Neurofeedback, EEG Brain Mapping, Virtual Reality Therapy, and EEG-Guided Meditation.

doctors_data.name: Dra. Veronica Portillo Reyes
doctors_data.title: Clinical Neuropsychologist - Director
doctors_data.bio: Clinical neuropsychologist at the doctoral level leading NeuroSpa Clinic. Pioneer in EEG-guided TMS in Ciudad Juarez with extensive experience in neuropsychological evaluation, clinical neuroscience, and psychotherapy. Published researcher in cognition, psychological wellbeing, and neuroscience.

name: Medisync Center
description_long: Medisync Center in Tijuana offers non-invasive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation treatment for depression, anxiety, attention deficit, and other neurological conditions. Located in the Madero (Cacho) neighborhood of Tijuana, the clinic provides accessible TMS therapy for patients from both Mexico and the United States seeking affordable neuromodulation treatments.
address: Ave. Guanajuato 2251, Local B, C y D, Col. Madero (Cacho)

name: BrainStim Centers - Cancun
description_long: BrainStim Centers Cancun offers MeRT (Magnetic e-Resonance Therapy) and Nextstim Navigated TMS (Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation) therapy. Located across the street from Hotel Oh! Cancun The Urban Oasis, the center provides personalized brain therapy treatments. BrainStim uses advanced EEG-guided protocols to customize TMS treatment for each patient's unique brain patterns.

name: TMS Clinics of Canada
description_long: TMS Clinics of Canada is a pioneering family-owned psychological clinic offering groundbreaking treatment options for individuals grappling with depression and various mental health challenges. Established in 2020 and spearheaded by Dr. Leo Steiner, the clinic is the first and only psychological clinic offering Deep TMS in the Greater Toronto Area. Using BrainsWay's Deep TMS technology, patients receive a non-invasive, medication-free 20-minute treatment session that targets deep structures of the brain associated with mood regulation.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Leo Steiner
doctors_data.title: Registered Psychologist, Founder
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Leo Steiner is a registered psychologist specializing in Neuropsychology and Rehabilitation Psychology with over 20 years of experience treating patients with depression. He founded TMS Clinics of Canada to bring Deep TMS technology to the Greater Toronto Area.

name: CAMH Temerty Centre for Therapeutic Brain Intervention
description_long: The Temerty Centre for Therapeutic Brain Intervention at the Centre for Addiction and Mental Health (CAMH) is one of the world's leading centres in brain stimulation treatment, research and training. The Centre offers consultation on clients with refractory and difficult-to-treat psychiatric disorders, using electroconvulsive therapy (ECT), magnetic seizure therapy (MST), repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) and transcranial direct current stimulation (tDCS). In fiscal year 2024, CAMH recorded 8,000 rTMS appointments.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Daniel Blumberger
doctors_data.title: Scientific Director, Temerty Centre for Therapeutic Brain Intervention
doctors_data.specialty: Geriatric Psychiatry, Interventional Psychiatry, Brain Stimulation
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Daniel Blumberger is a professor in the Department of Psychiatry at the University of Toronto and holds the Temerty Chair in Therapeutic Brain Intervention. He is a subspecialist in geriatric psychiatry and a leading researcher in brain stimulation therapies for refractory psychiatric disorders, with clinical trials spanning ECT, rTMS, MST, ketamine, and psilocybin.

name: Feel Light rTMS Clinic
description_long: Feel Light rTMS Clinic is a Toronto-based mental health clinic specializing in repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (rTMS) therapy. The clinic offers non-invasive, medication-free treatments for depression, anxiety, chronic pain, and other mental health conditions. Led by board-certified psychiatrist Dr. Chowdhury, the clinic provides personalized treatment plans with sessions available Monday through Friday, with accommodation for after-hours appointments.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Sheehan Chowdhury
doctors_data.title: Chief Psychiatrist
doctors_data.university: University of Calgary (MD), University of British Columbia (Psychiatry Residency), University of Alberta (Geriatric Psychiatry Fellowship)
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Chowdhury is a board-certified psychiatrist and the Chief Psychiatrist at Feel Light rTMS Clinic. He completed his medical degree from the University of Calgary, psychiatry residency at the University of British Columbia, and a geriatric psychiatry fellowship at the University of Alberta.

name: BrainStim Health
description_long: BrainStim Health is a leading mental health treatment centre in British Columbia, offering innovative therapies including TMS, psychedelic-assisted therapy, and psychotherapy. With centres in Vancouver and South Surrey, BrainStim is the first and only Deep TMS clinic in the Fraser Valley region. The clinic is staffed by experts with over 20 years of experience in mental health treatment, serving clients struggling with depression, anxiety, PTSD, and other conditions.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Venu Karapareddy
doctors_data.title: Founder & Medical Director
doctors_data.university: University of British Columbia (Clinical Assistant Professor)
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Venu Karapareddy is the Founder and Medical Director of BrainStim Healthcare Associates. He is a Clinical Assistant Professor at the University of British Columbia and the founding director of the Concurrent Disorder Fellowship in Vancouver, with extensive expertise in mental health and addiction medicine.

name: Field Trip Health Vancouver
description_long: Field Trip Health offers Repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (rTMS), an evidence-based, non-invasive treatment designed to stimulate nerve cells in targeted areas of the brain. Located in the Creekside area of Vancouver, the clinic also offers psychedelic-assisted therapy and counselling services. The multidisciplinary team includes nurse practitioners, registered clinical counsellors, and psychedelic therapy specialists.

doctors_data.name: Gurvir Grewal
doctors_data.title: Nurse Practitioner, NP(F)
doctors_data.university: University of British Columbia (Master of Nursing)
doctors_data.bio: Gurvir Grewal is a board-certified Family Nurse Practitioner with a Master of Nursing degree from the University of British Columbia and over eight years of frontline healthcare experience.

name: TMS Life
description_long: TMS Life is Ottawa's dedicated Deep TMS mental health clinic, founded by Dr. Chris Taplin. The clinic specializes in BrainsWay Deep TMS therapy, an FDA-approved treatment for depression (MDD), OCD, and smoking addiction. TMS Life provides safe, non-invasive treatment that does not require hospitalization or anaesthesia, administered in an outpatient setting.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Chris Taplin
doctors_data.title: Founder & Chief Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Chris Taplin is the founder and chief psychiatrist of TMS Life, specializing in Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation for treatment-resistant depression, OCD, PTSD and other mental health conditions. He is recognized by the International OCD Foundation as a TMS provider.

name: Neuromed Clinic
description_long: Neuromed Clinic is Edmonton's first TMS service provider, established in 2017. The clinic offers TMS, MeRT (Magnetic e-Resonance Therapy), and ketamine treatments for people suffering from depression, anxiety, and other mental health conditions. The founding physicians received specialist training at both Harvard University and Duke University, in addition to manufacturer training on their MagVenture MagPro system.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Ivan Murray
doctors_data.title: Consultant Psychiatrist, Co-Founder
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Ivan Murray is a Consultant Psychiatrist and co-founder of Neuromed Clinic. He previously worked at the Alberta Hospital Edmonton and has completed specialist training in neuromodulation from both Harvard University and Duke University.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Krista Leicht
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Krista Leicht is a Canadian-trained and Alberta-licensed Medical Doctor and Psychiatrist with over twenty years of clinical experience. She has completed training for rTMS and MeRT with the Brain Treatment Center.

name: Bloom rTMS Clinics
description_long: Bloom rTMS operates clinics in Calgary and Edmonton, offering repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation therapy for depression and other mental health conditions. Led by board-certified psychiatrists, the clinic provides evidence-based, non-invasive brain stimulation treatment in a comfortable outpatient setting.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Sheehan Chowdhury
doctors_data.title: Chief Psychiatrist
doctors_data.university: University of Calgary (MD), University of British Columbia (Residency), University of Alberta (Fellowship)
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Sheehan Chowdhury is a board-certified psychiatrist serving as Chief Psychiatrist at Bloom rTMS. He completed his medical degree at the University of Calgary, psychiatry residency at UBC, and a geriatric psychiatry fellowship at the University of Alberta.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Shakeel Qazi
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Shakeel Qazi brings experience from his previous role as Chief Operational Officer of Feel Light rTMS Clinic. He is part of the clinical team at Bloom rTMS providing rTMS treatment.

name: ANSR Clinic
description_long: ANSR (Atlantic Neuromodulation Solutions and Rehabilitation) Clinic is a neuromodulation clinic serving Atlantic Canada from its base in Bedford, Nova Scotia. The clinic offers rTMS as a non-medication treatment for major depression and certain anxiety and chronic pain disorders, alongside ketamine therapy. The multidisciplinary team includes psychiatrists, mental health nurses, respiratory therapists, and family medicine specialists.

name: Douglas Institute Neuromodulation Research Clinic
description_long: The Neuromodulation Research Clinic at the Douglas Mental Health University Institute is a leading rTMS treatment and research facility affiliated with McGill University. The clinic offers rTMS free of charge to residents of the province of Quebec, making it one of the most accessible TMS treatment centres in Canada. Directed by Dr. Marcelo Berlim, the clinic investigates the clinical utility of alternative neuromodulation protocols for treating mood disorders including accelerated rTMS.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Marcelo Berlim
doctors_data.title: Director, Neuromodulation Research Clinic
doctors_data.university: McGill University (Associate Professor, Department of Psychiatry)
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Marcelo Berlim is an associate professor at the Department of Psychiatry at McGill University and director of the Neuromodulation Research Clinic at the Douglas Institute. He is also a psychiatrist at the Depressive Disorders Program and investigates the clinical utility of alternative neuromodulation protocols for treating mood disorders.

name: Neurotherapy Montreal
description_long: Neurotherapy Montreal is a clinic within the ELNA Medical Group, offering cutting-edge, non-invasive treatments for mental health, neurological conditions, and cognitive challenges. The clinic specializes in Repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (rTMS) and Transcranial Direct Current Stimulation (tDCS) for conditions including depression, anxiety, PTSD, OCD, ADHD, persistent pain, sleep disorders, cognitive decline, and concussions. Sessions typically last 20-40 minutes with no sedation required.

name: BrainWave Clinic
description_long: BrainWave Clinic is the neuropsychiatry practice of Dr. Mandana Modirrousta, a pioneer of repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (rTMS) therapy in Manitoba. The clinic offers rTMS treatment for depression and other conditions with an integrative neuropsychiatry approach. As of October 2023, rTMS at BrainWave is covered for Manitoba residents with an active health card, making it one of the few publicly funded TMS programs in Canada. A standard course consists of 20-30 treatment sessions administered daily.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Mandana Modirrousta
doctors_data.title: Neuropsychiatrist, Founder
doctors_data.university: University of Manitoba (Associate Professor of Psychiatry)
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Mandana Modirrousta is an Associate Professor of Psychiatry at the University of Manitoba and a pioneer of repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (rTMS) therapy in Manitoba. She founded BrainWave Clinic to provide integrative neuropsychiatry care including rTMS and memory assessment.

name: Charité Zentrum für Translationale Neuromodulation
description_long: The Zentrum für Translationale Neuromodulation at Charité - Universitätsmedizin Berlin supplements the inpatient and outpatient care of the Clinic for Psychiatry and Psychotherapy (CCM) with innovative procedures for targeted influencing of brain activity through non-invasive brain stimulation and neurofeedback. The centre offers individual treatment with rTMS based on 15 years of scientific research and clinical application. rTMS is offered as an effective and well-tolerated innovative treatment method for depression.

doctors_data.name: Prof. Dr. Surjo Soekadar
doctors_data.title: Medical Director, Zentrum für Translationale Neuromodulation
doctors_data.bio: Prof. Dr. Surjo Soekadar is the Medical Director of the Zentrum für Translationale Neuromodulation at Charité Berlin. He leads both the clinical and research programs in non-invasive brain stimulation and neurofeedback at one of Europe's largest university hospitals.

name: Oberberg Fachklinik Fasanenkiez Berlin
description_long: Oberberg Fachklinik Fasanenkiez Berlin is a private acute psychiatric hospital in the heart of Berlin offering comprehensive medical-psychotherapeutic treatment. The clinic has expanded its therapy offerings to include repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (rTMS), where stimulation of nerve cells in the brain is achieved through a magnetic coil placed in the forehead area, allowing neurological and psychiatric diseases to be treated in a well-tolerable, pain-free and safe manner.

name: Privatpraxis Dr. Scheib
description_long: Privatpraxis Dr. Scheib is a private practice in Berlin specializing in psychosomatic medicine and psychotherapy, combining ketamine infusion therapy with intensive psychotherapy, hypnosis, repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) and neurofeedback. The practice is one of the pioneers worldwide in ketamine-assisted therapy for depression and also has a location in Munich. Dr. Scheib cooperates with neurocare Group for advanced neuromodulation treatments.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Scheib
doctors_data.title: Founder, Specialist in Psychosomatic Medicine and Psychotherapy
doctors_data.specialty: Psychosomatic Medicine, Psychotherapy, Ketamine Therapy, rTMS
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Scheib is the founder of Privatpraxis Dr. Scheib and a pioneer in combining ketamine-assisted therapy with rTMS and neurofeedback for treatment-resistant psychiatric conditions. The practice operates locations in Berlin, Munich, and internationally.

name: LMU Klinikum Zentrum für Neurostimulation
description_long: The Zentrum für Neurostimulation at the LMU Klinikum München (Ludwig-Maximilians-Universität) has been treating patients with depressive disorders using non-invasive transcranial brain stimulation since 1998, including transcranial magnetic stimulation (TMS) and transcranial direct current stimulation (tDCS). As one of the earliest adopters of TMS therapy in Germany, the centre is at the forefront of both clinical treatment and university-level research into neuromodulation therapies.

doctors_data.name: Prof. Dr. med. Frank Padberg
doctors_data.title: Director, Zentrum für Neurostimulation
doctors_data.bio: Prof. Dr. med. Frank Padberg is the director of the Zentrum für Neurostimulation at LMU Klinikum München. He has led the centre's pioneering work in non-invasive brain stimulation for depressive disorders since 1998, contributing to both clinical practice and international research guidelines.

name: neurocare Group
description_long: neurocare group, founded in 2015 by Tom Mechtersheimer and headquartered in Munich, is a global leader in neuromodulation methods including TMS and Neurofeedback. The company manufactures its own TMS devices (PowerMAG and Apollo systems through its MAG & More subsidiary, a spin-off from TU Munich) and operates clinics while also training professionals worldwide. neurocare's Apollo TMS devices have received FDA clearance for treating both adult and adolescent major depression, including an industry-leading intermittent Theta Burst Stimulation (iTBS) protocol. Sessions are delivered as 60-minute appointments that include psychotherapy supervision.

doctors_data.name: Tom Mechtersheimer
doctors_data.title: Founder & CEO
doctors_data.bio: Tom Mechtersheimer founded neurocare in 2015, bringing together leading neuroscience, technology manufacturers, processes and education for mental health clinics. Under his leadership, neurocare has expanded operations across Australia, the United States, and Europe.

name: NPZR - Neuro-Psychiatrisches Zentrum München Riem
description_long: NPZR (Neuro-Psychiatrisches Zentrum München Riem) is a comprehensive neuro-psychiatric medical practice in Munich offering rTMS (transcranial magnetic stimulation) alongside a wide range of neurological and psychiatric diagnostic and therapeutic services. The centre is staffed with psychiatrists and neurologists, providing both outpatient consultation and treatment in Munich's Messestadt West area.

name: Universitätsklinikum Heidelberg - Klinik für Allgemeine Psychiatrie
description_long: Since August 2021, the Klinik für Allgemeine Psychiatrie und Psychotherapie at Universitätsklinikum Heidelberg has offered repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) for patients with depressive disorders. This guideline-compliant treatment is used during inpatient treatment in addition to other multimodal therapy options, with rTMS sessions typically occurring daily on weekdays over approximately 6 weeks. The programme is expanding to include treatment for severe obsessive-compulsive disorder and psychotic disorders with persistent auditory hallucinations.

doctors_data.name: Prof. Dr. med. Sabine C. Herpertz
doctors_data.title: Ärztliche Direktorin (Medical Director)
doctors_data.bio: Prof. Dr. med. Sabine C. Herpertz has been the chair holder for General Psychiatry at Universitätsklinikum Heidelberg and the medical director of the Klinik für Allgemeine Psychiatrie since 2009. She holds specialist qualifications in Neurology, Psychotherapeutic Medicine, and Psychiatry.

name: Alexius/Josef Krankenhaus Neurostimulationszentrum
description_long: The Neurostimulationszentrum at Alexius/Josef Krankenhaus in Neuss combines numerous neurostimulation procedures including repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS), neurofeedback, electroconvulsive therapy (ECT), and innovative transcranial pulse stimulation (TPS). Located on the grounds of the Alexius/Josef Krankenhaus, the centre provides comprehensive non-invasive brain stimulation treatment options for psychiatric and neurological conditions.

doctors_data.name: Prof. Ulrich Sprick
doctors_data.title: Head of Neurostimulationszentrum
doctors_data.bio: Prof. Ulrich Sprick is the head of the Neurostimulationszentrum at Alexius/Josef Krankenhaus in Neuss, leading the centre's comprehensive non-invasive brain stimulation program.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Nadja Schenkendorf
doctors_data.title: Medical Leadership, Neurostimulationszentrum
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Nadja Schenkendorf holds a medical leadership role at the Neurostimulationszentrum at Alexius/Josef Krankenhaus.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Marcel Goertz
doctors_data.title: Medical Leadership, Neurostimulationszentrum
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Marcel Goertz holds a medical leadership role at the Neurostimulationszentrum at Alexius/Josef Krankenhaus.

name: Universitätsklinikum Hamburg-Eppendorf (UKE) - Psychiatrie
description_long: The Klinik und Poliklinik für Psychiatrie und Psychotherapie at the Universitätsklinikum Hamburg-Eppendorf (UKE) offers transcranial magnetic stimulation as part of its comprehensive psychiatric outpatient services. As one of Germany's leading university hospitals, UKE provides TMS treatment overseen by specialist psychiatrists alongside electroconvulsive therapy and other neuromodulation approaches.

doctors_data.name: Dr. med. Niklas Schade
doctors_data.title: Senior Physician (Oberarzt)
doctors_data.bio: Dr. med. Niklas Schade is the senior physician responsible for ambulatory services, electroconvulsive therapy, and transcranial magnetic stimulation at the UKE Department of Psychiatry and Psychotherapy in Hamburg.

name: Hôpital National des Quinze-Vingts - Service TMS
description_long: The Hôpital National des Quinze-Vingts offers transcranial magnetic stimulation (TMS) services through its neuro-imaging department. As a leading Parisian ophthalmic and neurological hospital, it provides TMS for both clinical treatment and research applications, treating conditions including neuropathic pain, treatment-resistant depression, and various neurological disorders. The hospital is part of the AP-HP network, France's largest public hospital system.

doctors_data.name: Service de Neuro-imagerie
doctors_data.title: Neuro-imaging Department
doctors_data.bio: The neuro-imaging department at Hôpital des Quinze-Vingts provides transcranial magnetic stimulation services for clinical and research purposes.

name: Hôpital Pitié-Salpêtrière - Service de Psychiatrie Adulte
description_long: The Adult Psychiatry Department at Hôpital Pitié-Salpêtrière, one of the largest hospitals in Europe, offers rTMS as part of its innovative therapeutic platform. The STOCAD unit includes 7 beds dedicated to brain stimulation techniques including non-invasive transcranial magnetic stimulation and deep brain stimulation evaluation. The service is actively involved in a major multicentre clinical research program (TRD*TMS) studying the efficacy and cost-effectiveness of rTMS for treatment-resistant depression across 20 centers in France.

doctors_data.name: Unité STOCAD
doctors_data.title: Brain Stimulation Unit
doctors_data.school: Sorbonne Université
doctors_data.bio: The STOCAD unit within the Adult Psychiatry Department has 15 inpatient beds with 7 dedicated to brain stimulation techniques including non-invasive TMS. The unit leads the TRD*TMS multicentre research study across 20 French centers.

name: Centre Hospitalier Théophile Roussel - Service rTMS
description_long: The Centre Hospitalier Théophile Roussel in Montesson opened its rTMS service in 2018 as part of its innovative psychiatric care practices. The center uses repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation to treat patients with treatment-resistant depression and resistant hallucinations. Treatment protocols typically involve 15-20 sessions at a rate of one session per day, 5 days per week, with each session lasting 15-30 minutes.

name: CEMNIS - Centre de neuro-Modulation Non-Invasive de Strasbourg
description_long: CEMNIS is a dedicated care unit at the Hôpital Civil de Strasbourg for treating refractory neuro-psychiatric conditions using non-invasive neuromodulation techniques. Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) is the center's primary tool, validated for treating neuropathic pain (5-10 sessions), treatment-resistant depression (20-30 sessions), and hallucinations and apathy in chronic psychosis (10 sessions). The center operates Monday to Friday, 9h to 17h30.

name: Clinique du Parc Lyon - Service rTMS
description_long: Clinique du Parc in Lyon, part of the Ramsay Santé network, offers repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (rTMS) for treating depression resistant to conventional therapies. The rTMS treatment uses a coil placed on the patient's head generating a magnetic field to stimulate or inhibit targeted brain areas. Treatment involves an average of 15-20 sessions, one session per day, 5 days per week. Each session lasts 15-30 minutes depending on the protocol. Patients remain awake during sessions and can resume activities immediately after.

name: Psychiatrie Pullman Prado - rTMS Marseille
description_long: Located at 255 Avenue du Prado in Marseille, the Psychiatrie Pullman Prado clinic specializes in rTMS treatment for treatment-resistant depression and other psychiatric conditions. The clinic has a team of psychiatrists trained in transcranial magnetic stimulation and electroconvulsive therapy, offering comprehensive psychiatric evaluation, diagnosis, and treatment of mood disorders and anxiety disorders.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Laura Brandejsky
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.school: Université de Bordeaux
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Laura Brandejsky specializes in the evaluation, diagnosis, and treatment of mood disorders and anxiety disorders. She has training in the practice and theory of electroconvulsive therapy and transcranial magnetic stimulation from the University of Bordeaux.

doctors_data.name: Dr. David Magalon
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. David Magalon specializes in the evaluation, diagnosis, and treatment of mood disorders including depression and bipolar disorder, as well as anxiety disorders.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Guillaume Lagrange
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Guillaume Lagrange specializes in managing anxiety-depressive disorders at the Pullman Prado rTMS clinic in Marseille.

doctors_data.name: Pr. Raphaëlle Richieri
doctors_data.title: Professor of Psychiatry
doctors_data.bio: Professor Richieri is part of the rTMS team at Psychiatrie Pullman Prado conducting rTMS sessions for treatment-resistant conditions.

name: Clinique Sainte Marguerite - Unité de Neuromodulation Cérébrale
description_long: The Maison de Santé Sainte Marguerite is an independent health establishment founded in 1975 in Novéant-sur-Moselle. The clinic has created a Cerebral Neuromodulation Unit to complement its psychiatric care pathway, developing innovative rTMS technology to treat depression. Each stimulation session lasts about twenty minutes. Subsequent sessions are conducted by the physician or nurse, all trained in the technique by a recognized training organization. Patients are referred by their psychiatrist or general practitioner for specific rTMS treatment.

name: Clinique Belle Allée - Service rTMS
description_long: Clinique Belle Allée in Orléans, part of the Ramsay Santé network, has been successfully using rTMS (repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation) to treat depression since 2014. The treatment protocol involves sessions lasting 5-20 minutes each, with an average of 20 sessions per patient. The psychiatrists determine stimulation objectives, magnetic field intensity, and session duration individually for each patient.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Sylvie Hubert
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Sylvie Hubert is a psychiatrist at Clinique Belle Allée who determines rTMS treatment protocols including stimulation objectives, magnetic field intensity, and session parameters.

doctors_data.name: Dr. David Jacon
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. David Jacon is a psychiatrist at Clinique Belle Allée specializing in rTMS treatment for depression.

name: Neurocavis - Unidad Clínica de Neuromodulación e Investigación
description_long: Neurocavis is a clinical unit dedicated to the diagnosis and treatment of neurological and psychiatric diseases through Deep Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation. Founded in Madrid, Neurocavis incorporated deep TMS into its treatments in 2014 and is a Research & Neuromodulation Clinical Unit. The center treats conditions including resistant depression, obsessive compulsive disorder, intractable pain, schizophrenia, and stroke. The multidisciplinary medical team includes specialists in neurosurgery, psychiatry, neurology, and neuropsychology.
address: Calle Conde de Cartagena, 3 Bajo D

doctors_data.name: Dr. F. Sanjuán Martín
doctors_data.title: Neurosurgeon, Medical Director
doctors_data.bio: Dr. F. Sanjuán Martín is the Medical Director of Neurocavis, specializing in neurosurgery and expert in neurological rehabilitation.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Néstor Szerman
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Néstor Szerman is Head of Mental Health Services of Retiro at the Psychiatry and Mental Health Institute of Gregorio Marañón Hospital in Madrid. He chairs the World Psychiatric Association (WPA) section on Dual Disorders and is an International Fellow of the American Psychiatry Association. His research focuses on dual pathology including psychosis, depression, suicide, and behavioral addictions.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Ernesto Delgado Cidranes
doctors_data.title: Pain Specialist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Delgado Cidranes has organized symposiums, meetings and round tables about pain and ultrasound techniques. He contributes to the neuromodulation pain treatment programs at Neurocavis.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Antonio Luengo Dos Santos
doctors_data.title: Neurologist
doctors_data.school: Hospital Universitario La Princesa
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Antonio Luengo Dos Santos is a specialist in Neurology at Hospital Universitario La Princesa since 2009 and head of Neurology Service at Hospital Universitario Alcalá de Henares. He is an expert in Stroke Pathology accredited by the Spanish Society of Neurology and member of the Madrid and Spanish Associations of Neurology.

name: Veram (Consulta Velázquez) - Unidad de Estimulación Magnética Transcraneal
description_long: Veram, formerly known as Consulta Velázquez, is a psychiatry and psychology clinic in Madrid specializing in Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS). The clinic's TMS unit is directed by Dr. Jaime Adán, trained in the technique at Duke University (USA) and member of the Clinical TMS Society. Veram offers comprehensive mental health services including psychiatry, psychology, neuropsychological evaluation, perinatal care, addiction therapy, EMDR, and non-invasive neuromodulation. TMS is described as an innovative and effective procedure for treating various psychiatric problems with excellent results and very good tolerance.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Jaime Adán Manes
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist, TMS Unit Director
doctors_data.school: Duke University (USA)
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Jaime Adán Manes directs the Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation Unit at Veram. He was trained in the TMS technique at Duke University (USA) and is a member of the Clinical TMS Society. He also works at Hospital Ruber Internacional (Quirónsalud).

name: Alcalamente - Centro de Estimulación Magnética Transcraneal
description_long: Alcalamente is a psychology and psychiatry center in Alcalá de Henares (Madrid) offering specialized diagnostic and treatment services for psychiatric, neurological, and addictive disorders using Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation. The clinic is led by Dr. Javier Conejo Galindo, named best psychiatrist in Madrid in 2021 and 2022. They offer EMT as a non-medication, non-invasive treatment option for various psychiatric and neurological conditions.
address: Avenida Juan Carlos I, número 13, local 74

doctors_data.name: Dr. Javier Conejo Galindo
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Javier Conejo Galindo leads the team of psychiatrists at Alcalamente. He was named best psychiatrist in Madrid in 2021 and 2022. He specializes in diagnosis and treatment of psychiatric disorders using Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation.

name: Institut Guttmann Barcelona - Servicio TMS
description_long: Institut Guttmann Barcelona, with over 54 years of experience, is the reference hospital for medical-surgical treatment and comprehensive rehabilitation of people with spinal cord injury, acquired brain damage, or other major neurological disabilities. The center has more than 400 professionals and offers Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) for the treatment of depression aimed at people with or without neurological issues who have been diagnosed with treatment-resistant major depression. The TMS service uses guided neuronavigation for precise stimulation targeting.

name: Instituto Neurocognitivo INCIA
description_long: The Instituto Neurocognitivo INCIA has over 20 years of experience in the diagnosis and treatment of central and peripheral nervous system disorders, sleep disorders, and neurocognitive disorders. INCIA is a member of the Clinical TMS Society and offers Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS/EMT) as a neurophysiological technique that allows safe, painless, and non-invasive induction of electrical current in the brain. When applied repetitively (rTMS), it modulates brain activity in the affected cortical region. INCIA considers TMS a first-line treatment for moderate to severe major depressive disorder.

doctors_data.name: Dra. Mª Ángeles Idiazábal
doctors_data.title: Clinical Neurophysiologist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Mª Ángeles Idiazábal is an expert in Non-Invasive Brain Stimulation, neuromodulation, and treatment with Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS). She won the National Prize for Medicine in Clinical Neurophysiology in 2018 and leads the INCIA institute.

name: Newline Center - Estimulación Magnética Transcraneal
description_long: Newline Center in Barcelona specializes in Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (EMTr) treatment. Led by Dr. Antoni Gual, a senior consultant and head of the Psychiatry Service Unit at Hospital Clínico de Barcelona, Newline Center brings together a multidisciplinary team of psychiatrists, psychotherapists, neuropsychologists, and toxicologists. Dr. Gual, author of more than 150 articles published in indexed journals, leads clinical activity and research in several areas of psychiatry and the development of new psychological and pharmacological treatments.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Antoni Gual
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist, Medical Director
doctors_data.school: Hospital Clínico de Barcelona
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Antoni Gual is a doctor in medicine and surgery, specialist in psychiatry. He is a senior consultant and head of the Psychiatry Service Unit at Hospital Clínico de Barcelona. Author of more than 150 articles published in indexed journals, he is a professor of several master's programs and director of several doctoral theses. He leads a multidisciplinary team at Newline Center for TMS treatment.

name: HM Nou Delfos - Estimulación Magnética Transcraneal
description_long: HM Nou Delfos, part of the HM Hospitales group, offers Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) therapy in Barcelona. The non-invasive TMS therapy uses MRI and other neuroimaging methods to guide placement of the magnetic coil, ensuring stimulation is directed to specific brain areas. The hospital offers comprehensive diagnostic and treatment services with a focus on bienestar (wellbeing). HM Nou Delfos provides a full range of psychiatric and neurological services alongside TMS therapy.

name: Hospital Ascires - Servicio de Estimulación Magnética Transcraneal
description_long: Hospital Ascires in Valencia offers Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) sessions as part of its neurological and psychiatric services. Ascires holds the ENS certification with the MEDIA category for its medical centers in the Valencian Community and Madrid. The hospital provides comprehensive neurology and neurosurgery services with advanced diagnostic imaging capabilities to guide TMS treatment precision.
address: Av. de les Tres Creus, 102, Patraix

name: Dr. Álvaro Moleón Ruiz - Unidad EMT del Instituto Andaluz de Salud Cerebral
description_long: The Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation Unit of the Andalusian Institute of Brain Health (IASC), led by Dr. Álvaro Moleón Ruiz, is a multidisciplinary team offering TMS services in Seville. It is the only TMS Unit in Andalusia with European certification for the treatment of depression, OCD, and addictions. Dr. Moleón has completed international university certifications on Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation from Duke University (USA) and Maastricht University, and is a member of the Clinical TMS Society.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Álvaro Moleón Ruiz
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist, TMS Unit Director
doctors_data.school: Duke University (USA), Maastricht University
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Álvaro Moleón Ruiz is a psychiatrist whose professional career has been linked to the study and clinical practice of neuroestimulation, first through Electroconvulsive Therapy and later through Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation. He has completed international university certifications on TMS from Duke University (USA) and Maastricht University. He is a member of the Clinical TMS Society and directs the only TMS Unit in Andalusia with European certification.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Miguel Moleón Camacho
doctors_data.title: Physician
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Miguel Moleón Camacho is part of the multidisciplinary team at the IASC TMS Unit in Seville.

name: Clínica MHS - Estimulación Magnética Transcraneal
description_long: Clínica MHS in Bilbao specializes in Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (EMT/TMS) guided by neuronavigation for the treatment of depression, anxiety, OCD, and addictions. The clinic operates from two locations in Bilbao and offers a comprehensive neuropsychiatric service including neuropediatrics, adult psychiatry, neuropsychological evaluation, high-capacity assessment, ADOS-2 evaluation, ADHD evaluation, and expert psychiatric reports.

name: Ionclinics - Expertos en Estimulación Magnética Transcraneal
description_long: Ionclinics is a leader in cerebral neuromodulation, developing and commercializing neuromodulation devices. They are experts in Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS), a non-invasive cerebral neuromodulation technique. The company provides both clinical TMS services and develops neuromodulation technology for healthcare providers.

name: Smart TMS - London
description_long: Smart TMS London is the flagship clinic of the UK's largest TMS provider, part of the neurocare group. Since opening in September 2015, the clinic has helped over a thousand patients find relief from depression, anxiety, OCD, PTSD, and addiction. Located in the heart of High Street Kensington, the CQC-registered clinic offers transcranial magnetic stimulation as a non-invasive, medication-free treatment for a range of mental health conditions. The highly experienced team of psychiatrists and psychologists is led by Medical Director Dr Leigh Neal, providing personalised care at every stage of treatment.

doctors_data.name: Dr Leigh A. Neal, MD FRCPsych
doctors_data.title: Medical Director & Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.school: Kings College London (Honorary Senior Lecturer); Maastricht University Certificate in TMS
doctors_data.bio: Dr Leigh A. Neal MD FRCPsych has been a Consultant Psychiatrist for over 25 years in both the NHS and Independent Sector, first appointed as a consultant in 1994. He holds a Bachelor of Medicine & Surgery, Certificate of Completed Specialist Training in General Adult Psychiatry, a Doctor of Medicine Degree, and a Maastricht University Certificate in TMS. He is a member of the advisory committee to the Royal College of Psychiatrists for TMS and a member of the International Neuromodulation Society. Formerly an RAF psychiatrist and hospital commander of the Armed Forces Psychiatric Hospital, he was also an Honorary Senior Lecturer at Kings College London and Leeds University.

doctors_data.name: Professor Alex O'Neill-Kerr
doctors_data.title: Consultant Psychiatrist & Visiting Professor in Neuromodulation
doctors_data.school: University of Northampton (Visiting Professor in Neuromodulation)
doctors_data.bio: Professor Alex O'Neill-Kerr is a consultant psychiatrist with clinical interests in depression and bipolar disorder. He was made Visiting Professor in Neuromodulation at the University of Northampton in 2017. He served as Medical Director at Northamptonshire Healthcare NHS Foundation Trust since 2005 and heads The Centre for Neuromodulation delivering treatments including rTMS, TBS, tDCS, and ketamine infusion. He has been working with TMS since 2015 and is one of the leading experts in TMS treatment in the UK.

name: Smart TMS - Birmingham
description_long: Smart TMS Birmingham, part of the neurocare group, is located at Birmingham Business Park and offers innovative TMS therapy to patients across the West Midlands. The clinic provides transcranial magnetic stimulation for depression, anxiety, ADHD, seasonal affective disorder, PTSD, borderline personality disorder, and addiction. The highly experienced team ensures patients receive the best possible care with personalised treatment plans tailored to each individual's needs.

doctors_data.name: Dr Leigh A. Neal, MD FRCPsych
doctors_data.title: Medical Director & Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.school: Kings College London; Maastricht University Certificate in TMS
doctors_data.bio: Dr Leigh A. Neal MD FRCPsych serves as Medical Director of Smart TMS across all locations. A Consultant Psychiatrist for over 25 years, he oversees the clinical standards and training of clinicians at the Birmingham clinic. He is a member of the advisory committee to the Royal College of Psychiatrists for TMS and the International Neuromodulation Society.

name: Smart TMS - Manchester
description_long: Smart TMS Manchester operates from Pall Mall Medical on King Street in the heart of Manchester city centre. Opened in 2018, the clinic provides transcranial magnetic stimulation therapy for depression, anxiety, addiction, OCD, and other mental health conditions. The highly skilled and qualified team provides personalised care at all stages of treatment, with a focus on achieving lasting improvement in mental health outcomes.

doctors_data.name: Dr Leigh A. Neal, MD FRCPsych
doctors_data.title: Medical Director & Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.school: Kings College London; Maastricht University Certificate in TMS
doctors_data.bio: Dr Leigh A. Neal MD FRCPsych oversees clinical standards at the Manchester clinic as Medical Director of Smart TMS. A Consultant Psychiatrist for over 25 years, he trains and supervises clinicians across all Smart TMS locations.

name: Smart TMS - Edinburgh
description_long: Smart TMS Edinburgh brings transcranial magnetic stimulation therapy to Scotland, located on Colinton Road in Edinburgh. The clinic offers TMS treatment for depression, anxiety, OCD, PTSD, addiction, and other mental health conditions, providing patients in Scotland with access to this non-invasive, medication-free treatment option. The clinic is staffed by trained TMS clinicians under the supervision of Smart TMS's medical director.

doctors_data.name: Dr Leigh A. Neal, MD FRCPsych
doctors_data.title: Medical Director & Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.school: Kings College London; Maastricht University Certificate in TMS
doctors_data.bio: Dr Leigh A. Neal MD FRCPsych is the Medical Director of Smart TMS, overseeing clinical governance and training across all locations including Edinburgh.

name: Smart TMS - Bristol
description_long: Smart TMS Bristol is located in the city centre next to Cabot Circus, providing transcranial magnetic stimulation therapy to patients across the South West of England. The clinic moved to its new central location in January 2025, offering improved accessibility for patients seeking TMS treatment for depression, anxiety, OCD, addiction, and other mental health conditions.

doctors_data.name: Dr Leigh A. Neal, MD FRCPsych
doctors_data.title: Medical Director & Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.school: Kings College London; Maastricht University Certificate in TMS
doctors_data.bio: Dr Leigh A. Neal MD FRCPsych oversees clinical standards at the Bristol clinic as Medical Director of Smart TMS.

name: Smart TMS - Southampton
description_long: Smart TMS Southampton is located at Enterprise House in Ocean Village, providing transcranial magnetic stimulation therapy to patients across Hampshire and the South Coast. The clinic offers TMS treatment for depression, anxiety, OCD, addiction, and other mental health conditions as part of the UK's largest network of TMS clinics.

doctors_data.name: Dr Leigh A. Neal, MD FRCPsych
doctors_data.title: Medical Director & Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.school: Kings College London; Maastricht University Certificate in TMS
doctors_data.bio: Dr Leigh A. Neal MD FRCPsych oversees clinical standards at the Southampton clinic as Medical Director of Smart TMS.

name: The London Psychiatry Centre
description_long: The London Psychiatry Centre, founded by Dr Andy Zamar, was the first clinic in the UK to offer Repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (rTMS) in 2012 and contributed to NICE approval of the procedure. Located at 72 Harley Street, the centre has treated the highest number of rTMS patients and is the most experienced rTMS clinic in the UK. They report that 59% of women and 62% of men treated for treatment-resistant depression with rTMS have recovered. The centre operates a dedicated rTMS clinic and a treatment-resistant depression/bipolar clinic.

doctors_data.name: Dr Andy Zamar, MBBCh MRCPsych
doctors_data.title: Founder & Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.school: Kasr El Einy School of Medicine, Cairo University (MBBCh with Honours, 1983-1989); triple qualified in UK and USA
doctors_data.bio: Dr Andy Zamar is a leading consultant psychiatrist and founder of The London Psychiatry Centre. He is triple qualified in medicine in Egypt (Cairo University), the UK and the USA. Awarded the Gaskell Gold Medal & Prize by the Royal College of Psychiatrists -- considered one of the foremost academic distinctions in clinical psychiatry -- he is acknowledged as a world expert in the treatment of resistant affective disorders including depression and bipolar spectrum disorder. He has taught psychiatry at Guy's and St Thomas's Teaching Hospitals, University College Teaching Hospital, Ain Shams University in Cairo and Makerere University in Kampala, Uganda.

doctors_data.name: Dr Christos Kouimtsidis, MBBS FRCPsych PhD
doctors_data.title: Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.school: Qualified in Medicine in Greece (1990); MSc University of London (1996); PhD Institute of Psychiatry, King's College London (2009)
doctors_data.bio: Dr Christos Kouimtsidis is a Consultant Psychiatrist and one of the foremost authorities on substance misuse in the UK. He has been a Consultant in Mental Health and Addiction Psychiatry since 2002 at the NHS and has worked at the London Psychiatry Centre since 2012. He completed his specialist training at South London and St George's Mental Health Trust and as a Clinical Lecturer at St George's University of London. He was elected Fellow of the Royal College of Psychiatrists in 2016 and is an Honorary Clinical Senior Lecturer at Imperial College London. He has published more than 80 peer-reviewed papers.

name: London TMS Centre
description_long: London TMS Centre offers a world-class and scientific TMS service in the UK, founded by Dr Mohamed Abdelghani, an internationally regarded TMS expert and President of the Clinical TMS Society. Located at 10 Harley Street in Marylebone, the centre offers various accelerated rTMS protocols including a course of 50 sessions over 5 days inspired by the Stanford SAINT protocol, representing the forefront of neuromodulation research. The team comprises specialist psychiatrists handpicked for their expertise in TMS.

doctors_data.name: Dr Mohamed Abdelghani, FRCPsych
doctors_data.title: Founder & Senior Consultant Psychiatrist; President, Clinical TMS Society
doctors_data.school: South London & Maudsley NHS Foundation Trust (postgraduate training); MSc Clinical Neuroscience, King's College London (2011); TMS training at Harvard University and Medical University of South Carolina
doctors_data.bio: Dr Mohamed Abdelghani is one of the pioneers of introducing TMS in UK clinical practice. In 2016 he founded the first clinical TMS service in the NHS in London at Camden and Islington NHS Foundation Trust. In May 2022 he was elected President of the Clinical TMS Society, the largest TMS professional association in the world -- the first person from outside the USA elected to this position. He completed his postgraduate psychiatric training at South London & Maudsley NHS Foundation Trust and was formally trained in TMS at Harvard University and the Medical University of South Carolina under Prof Mark George, who was the first psychiatrist to use TMS to treat depression.

doctors_data.name: Dr Farhana Mann
doctors_data.title: Consultant Psychiatrist & Clinical Academic
doctors_data.bio: Dr Farhana Mann is a Consultant Psychiatrist and clinical academic with many years of experience working in a wide range of mental health settings. She is part of the specialist team at London TMS Centre.

name: Priory Wellbeing Centre Harley Street
description_long: Priory Wellbeing Centre Harley Street is one of the few places in the UK where rTMS treatment can be accessed, offering this state-of-the-art treatment as part of the Priory Group's comprehensive mental health services. Located at 41 Harley Street, the centre provides rTMS for depression and OCD, with a team of consultant psychiatrists and dedicated rTMS coordinators. The centre is a registered and approved provider for all of the UK's leading private medical insurers.

doctors_data.name: Dr Leon Rozewicz, FRCPsych
doctors_data.title: Consultant Psychiatrist & Medical Director, Priory North London
doctors_data.school: Middlesex Hospital, University College London (undergraduate); St George's Hospital and Institute of Neurology, UCL (postgraduate)
doctors_data.bio: Dr Leon Rozewicz has been a consultant psychiatrist since 1995 and became Medical Director of Priory North London Hospital in 2015. He completed his undergraduate training at the Middlesex Hospital, University College London, and postgraduate training at St George's Hospital and the Institute of Neurology at UCL. Elected Fellow of the Royal College of Psychiatrists in 2005, he is also a member of the American Psychiatric Association and Fellow of the Royal Society of Medicine. He established the adult ADHD clinic in Barnet Enfield and Haringey Mental Health NHS Trust in 2007, one of the first such services in the UK. He is on the training committee of the UK Adult ADHD Network.

doctors_data.name: Dr Geoff Lawrence-Smith, MBBS MRCPsych
doctors_data.title: Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.school: University College London (MBBS, 2002; BSc Psychology, 1999); Maudsley Rotational Training Scheme; Royal College of Psychiatrists (MRCPsych, 2006)
doctors_data.bio: Dr Geoff Lawrence-Smith is a consultant psychiatrist with over 10 years' experience working full-time for the NHS in general adult community, consultation-liaison, and perinatal psychiatry. He trained at the North London rotation and completed higher training at the Maudsley Rotational training scheme. He became a member of the Royal College of Psychiatrists in 2006 and has developed expertise in supporting people with treatment-resistant mood disorders, offering rTMS treatment for depression at Priory. He contributed to research published in the American Journal of Psychiatry.

name: Pennine Care TMS Service
description_long: Pennine Care TMS is the first NHS provider of transcranial magnetic stimulation in the northwest of England, based at Forest House within the Royal Oldham Hospital.
