The service provides TMS treatment across the northwest, including Greater Manchester, Lancashire, and Cheshire. As an NHS service, it offers evidence-based TMS treatment for patients with treatment-resistant depression who meet the referral criteria, led by consultant psychiatrists with specialist training in neuromodulation.
address: Forest House, The Royal Oldham Hospital, Rochdale Road

doctors_data.name: Dr Micheal Kurkar
doctors_data.title: Lead Consultant Psychiatrist, TMS Service
doctors_data.bio: Dr Micheal Kurkar is a distinguished Consultant Psychiatrist who leads the Pennine Care TMS Service, which he established as the first NHS TMS service in the Northwest of England. He has served as Clinical Director for Mental Health Services in Oldham, Clinical Lead for the Strategic Clinical Network for Perinatal Psychiatry in Greater Manchester, and Lead for the Community Mental Health Transformation Programme at Pennine Care. He specialises in Adult Psychiatry with expertise in depression, treatment-resistant depression, bipolar affective disorder, ADHD, anxiety, and psychosis.

name: rTMS London at The London Clinic
description_long: rTMS London is a specialist clinic for chronic pain treatment using repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation, founded by Dr Stephanie Barrett. Operating within The London Clinic at 116 Harley Street, it is the first rheumatology clinic in the UK to offer rTMS brain stimulation for fibromyalgia and chronic musculoskeletal pain. The clinic brings a unique perspective to TMS by focusing on pain conditions rather than solely psychiatric disorders, with Dr Barrett drawing on her expertise as a consultant rheumatologist.

doctors_data.name: Dr Stephanie Kaye-Barrett, MBChB MD FRCP
doctors_data.title: Founder & Medical Director; Consultant Rheumatologist
doctors_data.school: Liverpool University School of Medicine (MBChB, final year clinical prize); MD, Royal Free Hospital; TMS certified, University of Maastricht
doctors_data.bio: Dr Stephanie Kaye-Barrett is a consultant rheumatologist with over 20 years of consultant-grade experience. She qualified from Liverpool University School of Medicine, winning the final year clinical medical prize, and completed her MD at the Royal Free Hospital. She underwent extensive TMS training from the University of Maastricht and is a certified specialist TMS provider. Former President of the Rheumatology Section of the Royal Society of Medicine, former Lead Rheumatologist at Chelsea and Westminster Hospital, and former Senior Lecturer in Rheumatology at Imperial College, she founded rTMS London as the first rheumatology clinic in the UK to offer rTMS for fibromyalgia and chronic pain.

name: Smart TMS - Northampton
description_long: Smart TMS Northampton is located within the historic grounds of Delapre Abbey, just off London Road. The clinic provides transcranial magnetic stimulation therapy for depression, anxiety, OCD, addiction, and other mental health conditions, with easy access for patients across Northamptonshire and the surrounding areas.

doctors_data.name: Professor Alex O'Neill-Kerr
doctors_data.title: Consultant Psychiatrist & Visiting Professor in Neuromodulation
doctors_data.school: University of Northampton (Visiting Professor in Neuromodulation, 2017)
doctors_data.bio: Professor Alex O'Neill-Kerr is a consultant psychiatrist and Visiting Professor in Neuromodulation at the University of Northampton since 2017. He serves as Medical Director at Northamptonshire Healthcare NHS Foundation Trust and heads The Centre for Neuromodulation. He is one of the leading experts in TMS treatment in the UK and has been working with TMS since 2015.

name: Smart TMS - Dublin
description_long: Smart TMS Dublin is Ireland's first dedicated TMS clinic, opened in 2017. Located at the Regus Building on Pembroke Street Upper in Dublin 2, the clinic brings innovative transcranial magnetic stimulation therapy to Ireland. The non-invasive treatment provides a medication-free solution for patients struggling with depression, anxiety, OCD, PTSD, addiction, and bipolar disorder. Smart TMS achieves a high success rate, with over 70% of patients experiencing positive outcomes, often noticing improvements after just a few sessions.
address: 30, Regus Building, Pembroke House, Pembroke Street Upper

doctors_data.name: Dr Leigh A. Neal, MD FRCPsych
doctors_data.title: Medical Director & Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.school: Kings College London; Maastricht University Certificate in TMS
doctors_data.bio: Dr Leigh A. Neal MD FRCPsych serves as Medical Director of Smart TMS across all locations including Dublin. A Consultant Psychiatrist for over 25 years, he oversees clinical standards and trains clinicians at the Dublin clinic.

name: Neuromed Clinic Ireland
description_long: Neuromed Clinic Ireland is the first Irish-owned TMS treatment centre in Ireland, located at 15A Northbrook Road in Ranelagh, Dublin. The expert team includes Irish Medical Council registered psychiatrists, licensed clinical psychologists, and specialised TMS technicians. The clinic offers TMS and MeRT (Magnetic e-Resonance Therapy) alongside comprehensive ADHD and autism assessments, EEG brain scans, and a range of mental health services. Telemedicine services are available across Ireland.

doctors_data.name: Dr Ivan Murray, MD MRCPsych
doctors_data.title: Medical Director & Consultant General Adult Psychiatrist
doctors_data.school: Trained in Ireland; Consultant at Galway University Hospital; Alberta Hospital/University of Alberta (2015-2020); TMS training at Harvard and Duke Universities
doctors_data.bio: Dr Ivan Murray is the Medical Director and co-founder of Neuromed Clinic Ireland and Neuromed Clinic Canada. After completing psychiatry training in Ireland, he served as Consultant Psychiatrist at Galway University Hospital before joining Alberta Hospital, Edmonton (2015-2020), where he also held an academic post at the University of Alberta. He has completed specialised training in advanced neuromodulation at Harvard and Duke Universities as well as emerging therapies such as ketamine in Alberta, Canada. He is UKAAN accredited for ADHD and is an active member of the Clinical TMS Society and Canadian Neuromodulation Society.

doctors_data.name: Dr Jennifer Keane, MB BCh BAO MRCPsych
doctors_data.title: Consultant Child & Adolescent Psychiatrist
doctors_data.school: University of Galway (graduated 2013); College of Psychiatrists of Ireland (CPsychI); Royal College of Psychiatrists (MRCPsych, 2016)
doctors_data.bio: Dr Jennifer Keane graduated in medicine from the University of Galway in 2013 and gained membership with both the College of Psychiatrists of Ireland and The Royal College of Psychiatrists in 2016. She has over a decade of experience in diverse psychiatric settings. Since 2018, she has specialised in child and adolescent psychiatry, working in both inpatient and outpatient CAMHS. She has worked with ADMiRE, Ireland's first ADHD-specific service for CAMHS, and is a guest lecturer for postgraduate programmes at the University of Galway.

name: St John of God University Hospital - rTMS Service
description_long: St John of God University Hospital in Stillorgan, Co. Dublin launched its rTMS service in 2025, becoming the first hospital in Ireland to introduce consultant-led rTMS treatment for depression on an inpatient and outpatient basis. The service is led by specialist consultant psychiatrists with expertise in mood disorders and neuromodulation. Each rTMS session lasts approximately 30 minutes and is conducted daily (Monday to Friday) over 4 to 6 weeks, targeting areas of the brain involved in mood regulation for patients with treatment-resistant depression.

doctors_data.name: Dr Simon Mitchell, MB BCh BAO MRCPsych
doctors_data.title: Consultant Psychiatrist & Head of Neuromodulation Services
doctors_data.school: Trinity College Dublin (BA Philosophy & Psychology); Royal College of Surgeons in Ireland (Medicine, 2006); Royal College of Psychiatrists (MRCPsych, 2011)
doctors_data.bio: Dr Simon Mitchell is a Consultant Psychiatrist at St John of God University Hospital specialising in mood disorders. He is the lead clinician for the hospital's ECT and Neuromodulation service and head of neuromodulation services. He completed his undergraduate degree in Philosophy and Psychology at Trinity College Dublin, studied Medicine at the Royal College of Surgeons in Ireland, and was awarded membership of the Royal College of Psychiatrists in 2011. He is a member of the Clinical TMS Society and has received several Clinical Excellence awards.

name: BrainsWay Ltd. - International Headquarters
description_long: BrainsWay is the pioneering developer of Deep TMS technology, headquartered in Jerusalem. Founded in 2003 as the exclusive licensee of the NIH-owned patent for the H-coil Deep TMS system, BrainsWay has expanded its presence across Israel with 11 system installations. Their Deep TMS technology is FDA-cleared for major depressive disorder, obsessive-compulsive disorder, and smoking addiction. The company collaborates with leading Israeli hospitals and has driven a significant expansion of TMS access following a 45% increase in reimbursement rates. In 2024, the Israel Ministry of Defense approved reimbursement of Deep TMS therapy for qualifying patients with PTSD at Israeli public hospitals.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Abraham Zangen
doctors_data.title: Co-Inventor, Deep TMS H-Coil
doctors_data.university: National Institutes of Health (NIH) / Ben-Gurion University of the Negev
doctors_data.bio: Co-inventor of the Deep TMS H-coil technology while working at the NIH in the late 1990s. Professor of Neuroscience at Ben-Gurion University, with decades of research in brain stimulation and neuromodulation.

name: Tel Aviv Sourasky Medical Center - Psychiatry Division
description_long: Tel Aviv Sourasky Medical Center (Ichilov) is a 1,500-bed world-class governmental academic medical center serving over one million people and recognized as Israel's leading multidisciplinary healthcare institution. The Psychiatry Division offers biological treatments including medications, electroconvulsive therapy, and deep transcranial magnetic stimulation (Deep TMS). The center has been involved in significant TMS research including studies on ADHD, PTSD, and depression, and has participated in randomized controlled trials assessing the efficacy of Deep TMS for adults with attention deficit hyperactivity disorder.

name: Shalvata Mental Health Center
description_long: Shalvata Mental Health Center, located in Hod HaSharon, Israel, is a comprehensive psychiatric facility founded in 1956 by Clalit, Israel's largest health organization. Set in a pastoral environment, the center provides holistic mental health care using an integrative approach combining biological, psychological, and rehabilitative therapies. Shalvata uses transcranial magnetic stimulation (TMS) extensively in its clinical work and research. The center is affiliated with the Sackler School of Medicine at Tel Aviv University, enabling education and training for mental health professionals. The facility serves children, adolescents, adults, and seniors.

name: Beer Yaakov-Ness Ziona Mental Health Center
description_long: Beer Yaakov-Ness Ziona Mental Health Center is a major psychiatric facility in central Israel affiliated with Tel Aviv University. The center has been a key site for deep TMS clinical research, participating in prospective multicenter randomized controlled trials examining the efficacy and safety of deep transcranial magnetic stimulation for major depression. The center has also conducted double-blind studies using deep TMS for treating auditory hallucinations in schizophrenic patients. The facility offers inpatient and outpatient services for adults, children, adolescents, and older adults with various mental health disorders, as well as treatment programs for substance abuse and addiction.

name: Abarbanel Mental Health Center
description_long: Abarbanel Medical Center for Mental Health is one of Israel's leading psychiatric hospitals, established in 1944 in Bat Yam. The center is a BrainsWay Deep TMS provider, offering advanced neuromodulation treatment for depression and other psychiatric disorders. Abarbanel provides comprehensive inpatient and outpatient services for both children and adults, with specialized facilities for addiction treatment and suicide prevention. Emergency psychiatric care is available around the clock. The facility has recently been integrated administratively with Tel Aviv Sourasky Medical Center (Ichilov).

name: Geha Mental Health Center
description_long: Geha Mental Health Center, opened in 1942 in Petah Tikva, is a well-regarded psychiatric institution that is part of the Clalit Health Services network. The center operates a dedicated TMS department offering Deep TMS (Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation) treatment for depression, OCD, and smoking addiction. Geha provides a broad spectrum of medical services employing progressive diagnostic and treatment techniques for mental health disorders, rehabilitation, and social reintegration. The center serves patients across the lifespan from children to older adults, utilizing both traditional and innovative treatment methods.

name: Lev Hasharon Mental Health Center
description_long: Lev Hasharon Mental Health Center in Netanya operates across three campuses: a main campus with 263 inpatient beds, two clinics, and four day-treatment programs; a community campus in Netanya with three clinics and two day-treatment programs; and a campus for community housing for Holocaust survivors with 100 beds. The hospital is a designated BrainsWay Deep TMS provider and specializes in sexual trauma, addiction, psychogeriatrics, resistant depression with advanced technologies, and forensic psychiatry. Deep TMS at Lev Hasharon is FDA-approved for treatment of Depression (MDD), OCD, and Smoking Addiction.

name: Matzpen Mental Health Center
description_long: Matzpen Clinic is a private psychotherapy, psychiatry, and neurology centre founded in 2006 on the Tel Aviv seafront. The location offers panoramic views of the Mediterranean beach. As a highly specialised private clinic, Matzpen takes a comprehensive approach to outpatient diagnosis and treatment of psychiatric, neurological, psychosomatic, and addiction disorders. The center has international status and accepts citizens from different countries, with all clinic staff fluent in several languages. Matzpen's specialists have developed holistic and individualized treatment approaches, including neuromodulation therapies.

name: Sheba Medical Center - Psychiatry Division
description_long: Sheba Medical Center at Tel HaShomer is the most comprehensive medical center in the Middle East, featuring 159 medical departments and clinics and treating over one million patients annually. The Psychiatry Division has been actively involved in TMS research, with studies treating patients with major depression using transcranial magnetic stimulation showing significant response rates, particularly among non-psychotic patients. Sheba is home to the Israel National Center for Health Policy and Epidemiology Research, the Israel National Center for Medical Simulation, and numerous other research centers.

name: Hadassah Medical Center - Department of Psychiatry
description_long: Hadassah Medical Center at Ein Kerem in Jerusalem is one of Israel's most prestigious academic medical centers. The Department of Psychiatry at Hadassah-Hebrew University Medical Center has been involved in clinical research with deep TMS, including studies on post-traumatic stress disorder. The hospital has a long relationship with BrainsWay Deep TMS technology, and its physicians have participated in multi-site clinical trials evaluating Deep TMS combined with brief exposure therapy for PTSD. Hadassah serves as a major teaching hospital affiliated with the Hebrew University of Jerusalem.

name: Psykiatri Sydvast - Enheten for Hjarnstimulering
description_long: The Unit for Brain Stimulation (Enheten for Hjarnstimulering) at Psykiatri Sydvast offers both ECT and TMS treatment for patients with affective disorders. Located at Huddinge Hospital (part of Karolinska University Hospital), the clinic serves adult psychiatry patients across the southern Stockholm catchment area. The unit collaborates with Karolinska Institute as well as other healthcare providers, colleges, and universities. TMS treatment at this facility is offered as a standard treatment option for moderate to severe depression, in line with the Swedish National Board of Health and Welfare's 2017 guidelines.

name: Norra Stockholms Psykiatri - Mottagning for Hjarnstimulering
description_long: The Brain Stimulation Clinic (Mottagning for Hjarnstimulering) at Norra Stockholms Psykiatri, located in the Sankt Gorans hospital area in Stadshagen, Stockholm, primarily treats patients with depression using electroconvulsive treatment and repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS). The clinic has reported that rTMS alleviates depressive symptoms in every other patient treated. Norra Stockholms Psykiatri provides specialist psychiatric care based on regional care programs and is one of the major psychiatric providers in the Stockholm region.

name: Psykiatri Nordvast - Enheten for Hjarnstimulering
description_long: The Brain Stimulation Unit (Enheten for Hjarnstimulering) at Psykiatri Nordvast is a specialist unit at Danderyds Hospital offering ECT and rTMS treatment for patients with affective disorders. The unit serves the northwest Stockholm catchment area and provides evidence-based brain stimulation therapies for depression and other mood disorders. Treatment is offered in accordance with Swedish national guidelines recommending rTMS for moderate to severe depression as an alternative or complement to antidepressant medication.

name: Akademiska Sjukhuset - Mottagningen for Hjarnstimulering
description_long: The Brain Stimulation Unit (Mottagningen for Hjarnstimulering) at Akademiska Sjukhuset (Uppsala University Hospital) offers ECT and rTMS (repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation) as well as other psychiatric treatments requiring advanced monitoring. The unit is part of the section for Acute and Consultation Psychiatry. Uppsala University Hospital has been at the forefront of TMS research in Sweden, with studies demonstrating that magnetic stimulation of the brain can be an effective treatment for depression, including during pregnancy. The hospital was also the first in Sweden to offer transcranial ultrasound for brain disorders.

name: Sahlgrenska Universitetssjukhuset - Psykiatri
description_long: Sahlgrenska University Hospital is the largest hospital in Sweden with 17,000 employees, formed in 1997 by the merger of Sahlgrenska Hospital, Ostra Hospital, and Molndal Hospital. The hospital network, associated with the Sahlgrenska Academy at the University of Gothenburg, provides rTMS treatment through its psychiatric services. The psychiatric emergency department and adult psychiatric services are located at Ostra Hospital. Sahlgrenska has 2,000 beds across its three campuses and is a major center for psychiatric research and treatment in western Sweden.

name: rTMS Behandling
description_long: rTMS Behandling is a dedicated private TMS treatment provider in Sweden offering repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation for depression. The clinic provides rTMS as an effective alternative to antidepressant medication, with the treatment performed while the patient is awake and without negative effects on memory. Based on over 40 independent clinical studies involving more than 2,000 patients, rTMS has been demonstrated to be effective in treating severe depression. The clinic follows the Swedish National Board of Health and Welfare guidelines recommending rTMS for moderate to severe depression.

name: Capio Psykiatri Helsingborg
description_long: Capio Psykiatri Helsingborg is a private psychiatric clinic contracted with Region Skane, offering specialist psychiatric care for patients aged 18 and over. The clinic provides repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) as part of its psychiatric treatment offerings. Capio Hjarnhalsan, the mental health division of the Capio/Ramsay Sante healthcare group, opened its Helsingborg clinic at a central location and holds agreements with the regional health authority to provide psychiatric services including rTMS for treatment-resistant depression.

name: Connectomix - Netcare Milpark Hospital
description_long: Connectomix is a state-of-the-art TMS clinic group founded in 2019 and based in Johannesburg and Pretoria, backed by Netcare, the largest private hospital group in South Africa. The Milpark location is situated within the esteemed Netcare Milpark Hospital in Parktown, Johannesburg. Headed by Dr. Christos Profyris, a neurosurgeon who completed pre-clinical studies at Cambridge with a Double First Class and his medical degree with Distinction at Oxford, Connectomix employs a team of doctors, psychologists, and experts with a Neuroscientist overseeing treatment accuracy. The clinic treats depression, anxiety, PTSD, tinnitus, and other conditions using advanced connectome-based TMS protocols.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Christos Profyris
doctors_data.title: Founder & Neurosurgeon
doctors_data.university: University of Cambridge / University of Oxford / University of the Witwatersrand
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Christos Profyris completed pre-clinical medical studies at the University of Cambridge with a Double First Class and his medical degree with Distinction at the University of Oxford. He completed neurosurgical training at the University of Witwatersrand, holds a Fellowship from the Colleges of Medicine of South Africa and a Master of Medicine in Neurosurgery from Wits. He completed the Charles Teo Minimally Invasive Neurosurgery Fellowship in Sydney, Australia, and has published over 20 peer-reviewed publications with an active research interest in connectome-based TMS treatment.

name: Connectomix - Menlyn Maine
description_long: Connectomix Menlyn Maine is located in the Menlyn Maine precinct in Pretoria, easily accessible from surrounding suburbs and major roadways. As part of the Connectomix TMS clinic group backed by Netcare, the largest private hospital group in South Africa, this location offers advanced connectome-based TMS treatment for depression, anxiety, PTSD, tinnitus, and other neuropsychiatric conditions. The clinic employs extensively trained staff with a Neuroscientist overseeing treatment accuracy and continuous auditing of the navigation process.
address: Menlyn Maine Central Square, C/o Corobay & Aramist Avenue, Waterkloof Glen

doctors_data.name: Dr. Anrie Carstens
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Anrie Carstens has partnered with Connectomix founder Dr. Christos Profyris to bring TMS services to patients in the Gauteng region. She provides psychiatric consultation and TMS treatment oversight at the Pretoria location.

name: Rewire TMS Clinic - Claremont
description_long: Rewire TMS Clinic in Claremont is located within the Crescent Mediclinic in Cape Town's Southern Suburbs. Founded in 2021 by Dr. Marcelle Stastny, a psychiatrist with over twenty years of experience, Rewire offers 1Hz, 10Hz, and theta burst (modified SAINT) TMS treatments. The clinic's technicians obtained their TMS accreditation from Maastricht University. TMS treatment at Rewire is approved by the FDA, CE, and SAHPRA, and for treatment-resistant depression is covered by some South African medical aids, subject to authorisation. The clinic also serves foreign clients seeking TMS treatment combined with travel to Cape Town.
machines: TMS System (1Hz, 10Hz, Theta Burst / Modified SAINT protocols)

doctors_data.name: Dr. Marcelle Stastny
doctors_data.title: Founder & Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Marcelle Stastny is a psychiatrist with over twenty years of experience who founded Rewire TMS Clinics in 2021. She holds an MBChB from the University of Pretoria and previously worked as a psychiatrist for the NHS in Exeter, UK. She has established Rewire branches across South Africa to improve access to TMS therapy.

name: Rewire TMS Clinic - N1 City (Claro Clinic)
description_long: Rewire TMS Clinic at N1 City is located within the Life Path Health Claro Clinic in Cape Town's Northern Suburbs. As part of the Rewire network founded by Dr. Marcelle Stastny, this location offers 1Hz, 10Hz, and theta burst (modified SAINT) TMS treatments administered by accredited technicians trained at Maastricht University. Life Path Health Claro Clinic is a private psychiatric hospital contracted with major South African medical aids, providing a supportive clinical environment for TMS treatment.
address: Claro Clinic, Syfred Douglas Street, N1 City
machines: TMS System (1Hz, 10Hz, Theta Burst / Modified SAINT protocols)

doctors_data.name: Dr. Marcelle Stastny
doctors_data.title: Founder & Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Marcelle Stastny oversees the Rewire TMS network including this N1 City location. She holds an MBChB from the University of Pretoria and has over twenty years of psychiatric experience.

name: Rewire TMS Clinic - Roodepoort
description_long: Rewire TMS Clinic in Roodepoort serves the Gauteng region from its location at Cat's Corner in Weltevreden Park. As part of the Rewire TMS network, this Johannesburg-area clinic offers the same advanced TMS protocols available at the Cape Town locations, including 1Hz, 10Hz, and theta burst (modified SAINT) treatments. The clinic extends Rewire's reach to patients in Gauteng who require non-invasive brain stimulation therapy for treatment-resistant depression and other psychiatric conditions.
address: Cat's Corner, 39 Kroton Way, Weltevreden Park
machines: TMS System (1Hz, 10Hz, Theta Burst / Modified SAINT protocols)

name: Dr. Kobus van der Walt - TMS Practice
description_long: Dr. Kobus van der Walt operates a private psychiatric practice in Somerset West, Cape Town, with a particular focus on interventional psychiatry. Since 2019 in full-time private practice, the clinic offers advanced neuromodulation therapies including TMS (Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation), IV Ketamine (IVK), transcranial direct current stimulation (tDCS), and transcutaneous vagus nerve stimulation (tVNS). TMS is used as a non-invasive treatment using focused magnetic pulses to stimulate brain areas associated with mood regulation, most commonly for treatment-resistant depression. The practice serves patients across Stellenbosch, the Winelands, Cape Town Metro, Overberg, and the broader Western Cape.
address: Suite 105, Halo Medical Centre, 27 Gardner Williams Avenue, Paardevlei

doctors_data.name: Dr. Kobus van der Walt
doctors_data.title: Specialist Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Kobus van der Walt is a qualified specialist psychiatrist based in Somerset West with a particular interest in interventional psychiatry. Since 2019 in full-time private practice, he offers personalised, evidence-informed psychiatric care to adults and adolescents, with a focus on individuals navigating persistent, complex, or treatment-resistant mental health difficulties. His practice offers TMS, IV Ketamine, tDCS, tVNS, and home-based sleep studies.

name: Careline Clinic - TMS Unit
description_long: Careline Clinic in Kimberley, Northern Cape, has procured a Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) machine to treat major depressive disorders, anxiety, and treatment-resistant depressive disorders. The clinic provides Substance Abuse Psychiatry, Adult Voluntary Psychiatry, and Child & Adolescent Psychiatry services. Located on Provincial Road R31 in El Toro Park, the clinic offers comprehensive mental and physical wellbeing services including inpatient psychiatric care.
address: R31 Provincial Road, El Toro Park

doctors_data.name: Dr. Netsa Kirimi
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Netsa Kirimi provides psychiatric services at Careline Clinic in Kimberley, including oversight of the TMS treatment program for depression and anxiety disorders.

name: Connectomix - TMS Safari (Cape Town)
description_long: Connectomix TMS Safari is a unique program combining intensive TMS treatment with a South African travel experience. Based on the success of their Johannesburg and Pretoria clinics, Connectomix has expanded to Cape Town offering international patients the opportunity to undergo a full course of TMS therapy while experiencing South Africa. The program treats depression with FDA, CE, and SAHPRA-approved TMS protocols. Patients receive comprehensive connectome-based TMS treatment under the oversight of trained neuroscientists and the clinical team led by Dr. Christos Profyris.
address: Cape Town (location details available upon booking)

doctors_data.name: Dr. Christos Profyris
doctors_data.title: Founder & Neurosurgeon
doctors_data.university: University of Cambridge / University of Oxford / University of the Witwatersrand
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Christos Profyris oversees the TMS Safari program, bringing his expertise in connectome-based TMS treatment to international patients visiting South Africa.

name: Mindful TMS Neurocare - Bangalore
description_long: Mindful TMS, an initiative by Rangsons (part of NR Group), is the first chain of super-specialized TMS Neurocare centers in India. They take a holistic approach to treating mental illnesses with TMS at the core, customizing unique programs that include meditation, yoga, and other relevant treatments. With 5+ years of rTMS experience and 10+ clinics across India and USA, Mindful TMS offers safe, medication-free rTMS treatment for depression, anxiety, and OCD.
address: 704, 2nd Floor, ASN Signature, Varthur Road, Palm Meadows, Siddapura, Whitefield

doctors_data.name: Dr. Naveen Jayaram
doctors_data.title: Founder & Chief Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Naveen Jayaram received his MD in Psychiatry from NIMHANS in 2012. He has received the Young Scientist Award from the World Association of Biological Psychiatry in 2011 and Best Resident Award from NIMHANS in 2012. He specializes in stress management, de-addiction, and rTMS therapy.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Abhishek Nagakumar
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Consultant Psychiatrist at Mindful TMS Neurocare Bangalore specializing in rTMS-based treatment for mood and anxiety disorders.

name: Mindful TMS Neurocare - Delhi
description_long: Mindful TMS Neurocare's Delhi center located in Greater Kailash offers safe, medication-free rTMS treatment for depression, anxiety, and OCD. As part of the Mindful TMS chain, the first super-specialized TMS Neurocare centers in India, the Delhi branch provides holistic mental healthcare combining rTMS with therapy, assessments, and neurofeedback.
address: S-35, First Floor, Greater Kailash-1, Masjid Moth, Greater Kailash

name: MindBrain TMS Institute
description_long: MindBrain is a leading Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation provider in Delhi founded by Dr. Anuranjan Bist, a USA-trained Board-Certified Psychiatrist. The institute integrates TMS and Ketamine therapy with holistic approaches for treating depression, anxiety, OCD, and other mental health conditions. Located opposite AIIMS Trauma Centre in Safdarjung Enclave, MindBrain offers pioneering single-day TMS treatment protocols.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Anuranjan Bist
doctors_data.title: Founder & CEO, Board-Certified Psychiatrist
doctors_data.qualifications: MBBS (University of Mumbai), MPH (University of South Carolina), MD (Brookdale University Hospital, New York), Diplomate of American Board of Psychiatry and Neurology
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Anuranjan Bist is a USA-trained Board-Certified Psychiatrist who practiced in the USA for 18 years before opening MindBrain Institute in India. He has redefined therapeutic approaches by integrating TMS and Ketamine therapy with yoga techniques. He is the author of 'Beyond the Brain' and recipient of the Chief Residents Award (2006).
doctors_data.university: University of Mumbai / Brookdale University Hospital, New York

name: EHSAAS - Centre for Comprehensive Psychiatric Care
description_long: EHSAAS (meaning 'Heal a Little Everyday') is a comprehensive psychiatric care center in South Delhi founded by Dr. Manish Sarkar, an elite alumnus of NIMHANS. The clinic specializes in rTMS therapy along with pharmacological management of psychiatric disorders including substance dependence, adult psychiatric disorders, and child and geriatric psychiatric disorders.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Manish Sarkar
doctors_data.title: Founder & Senior Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Manish Sarkar is an elite alumnus of NIMHANS, Bangalore. With around 19 years of experience, he specializes in administering rTMS therapy and pharmacological management of all types of psychiatric disorders. He is an expert in substance dependence disorders, adult psychiatric disorders, and child and geriatric psychiatric care.

name: Asha Neuromodulation Clinic (ANC) - Gachibowli
description_long: Asha Neuromodulation Clinic (ANC) is India's leading neuromodulation center, specializing in advanced non-invasive brain stimulation therapies including rTMS, Deep TMS, tDCS, and biofeedback. ANC is one of the only institutions in India to use the advanced Brainsway Deep TMS system and TMS with Neuronavigation. With 40+ qualified psychiatrists and psychologists, ANC provides comprehensive mental health care across multiple locations in Hyderabad.
address: 4th Floor, Fantasy Square Building, Biodiversity Circle, Jayabheri Pine Valley, Gachibowli

doctors_data.name: Dr. M.S. Reddy
doctors_data.title: Senior Psychiatrist & Director
doctors_data.qualifications: MBBS (S.V. Medical College, Tirupati, 1978), DPM (Christian Medical College, Vellore, 1982), MD Psychiatry (Christian Medical College, Vellore, 1984)
doctors_data.bio: Dr. M.S. Reddy is a senior psychiatrist with 45+ years of experience specializing in bipolar disorder, depression, OCD, and mood disorders. He pioneered the multi-centered clinical use of Deep TMS technology for treating psychiatric disorders in India. He is the Director of Asha Bipolar Clinic and a leading thought leader in mental healthcare in India.
doctors_data.university: S.V. Medical College, Tirupati / Christian Medical College, Vellore

doctors_data.name: Dr. Chytanya Deepak
doctors_data.title: Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Consultant Psychiatrist at Asha Neuromodulation Clinic specializing in neuromodulation therapies and comprehensive mental health care.

doctors_data.name: Dr. S. Swetha Reddy
doctors_data.title: Women's Mental Health Specialist
doctors_data.bio: Specialist in women's mental health at Asha Hospital, providing psychiatric care with focus on perinatal and reproductive psychiatry.

name: TransMag Well-Being Clinic
description_long: TransMag Well-Being Clinic is a pioneering rTMS center in Mumbai founded by Dr. Shamsah Sonawalla, an internationally renowned psychiatrist who specialized in Repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation at Harvard. Established in 2010, TransMag was among the first dedicated rTMS clinics in India, offering state-of-the-art, safe, and effective treatment for depression and other clinical conditions.
address: Vasant, 1st Floor #6, Opposite Activity School, Peddar Road

doctors_data.name: Dr. Shamsah Sonawalla
doctors_data.title: Founder & Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.qualifications: MBBS, MD Psychiatry (Bombay University / T.N. Medical College & B.Y.L. Nair Hospital), Postdoctoral Training (Harvard), Former Assistant Professor of Psychiatry (Harvard)
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Shamsah Sonawalla is an internationally renowned psychiatrist, author, and researcher with over 22 years of clinical and research experience across India and the United States. She completed her postdoctoral training at Harvard and specialized in rTMS for psychiatric disorders in 2008. She is also Associate Director of Psychiatry Research and Consultant Psychiatrist at Jaslok Hospital and Research Center, Mumbai. She has over 100 publications in leading journals including the American Journal of Psychiatry.

name: NIMHANS - Department of Psychiatry
description_long: The National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS) is India's premier institution for mental health and neuroscience research and treatment, located in Bangalore. NIMHANS conducted the first randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial of rTMS to treat depression in India. The Department of Psychiatry offers rTMS therapy as part of its comprehensive psychiatric services.
address: Hosur Road, Marigowda Road, Lakkasandra, Wilson Garden

doctors_data.name: Dr. Shyam Sundar A
doctors_data.title: Associate Professor, Department of Psychiatry
doctors_data.bio: Associate Professor in the Department of Psychiatry at NIMHANS with specialized interest in repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) and its applications for OCD and depression treatment.

name: Cadabams Hospitals
description_long: Cadabams Hospitals is a leading psychiatric hospital in Bangalore offering multidisciplinary team care including psychiatrists, psychologists, social workers, nurses, and rehab therapists. They provide evidence-based care including CBT, ECT, rTMS, and neurofeedback across 8 specialty centers. With advanced in-house rTMS equipment, Cadabams offers expert rTMS treatment for depression, anxiety, bipolar disorder, and chronic pain.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Madhukar BR
doctors_data.title: Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Senior Consultant Psychiatrist at Cadabams Hospitals with expertise in rTMS therapy, mood disorders, and comprehensive psychiatric care.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Vishal Kasal
doctors_data.title: Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Consultant Psychiatrist at Cadabams Hospitals specializing in evidence-based psychiatric treatments including rTMS, CBT, and pharmacotherapy.

name: Somnos rTMS Clinic
description_long: Somnos rTMS Clinic in Kolkata provides the latest US FDA-approved rTMS treatment for resistant depression and OCD at affordable costs. Founded by Dr. Sourav Das, the clinic offers cutting-edge, cost-effective, and empathetic treatment for a range of mental health issues. rTMS sessions are priced between Rs. 1,650 to Rs. 1,950 per session, making advanced neuromodulation therapy accessible in Eastern India.
address: Ground & First Floor, 14B, Selimpur Road, Dhakuria E Rd, beside Bank of India Quarters, Selimpur

doctors_data.name: Dr. Sourav Das
doctors_data.title: Founder & Senior Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Sourav Das is a senior consultant psychiatrist and addiction medicine and sleep medicine specialist. He founded Somnos rTMS Clinic to provide affordable, cutting-edge rTMS treatment for resistant depression and OCD in Kolkata and Eastern India.

name: Institute of Mental Health (IMH) - Neurostimulation Service
description_long: The Institute of Mental Health (IMH) has the largest psychiatric rTMS service in Singapore, offering TMS treatment since 2015 for patients with treatment-resistant depression under its Neurostimulation Service. IMH is currently conducting pioneering clinical trials (APIC-TMS and SPARK-D) in collaboration with NUS Medicine to study personalised TMS for treatment-resistant depression, making Singapore the first country in Southeast Asia to conduct such trials.
address: 10 Buangkok View, Buangkok Green Medical Park

doctors_data.name: Dr. Tor Phern Chern
doctors_data.title: Senior Consultant & Head of Neurostimulation Service
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Tor Phern Chern is a Senior Consultant in the Department of Mood & Anxiety and Head of Neurostimulation Service at IMH. He is a certified clinical TMS practitioner and teaching faculty for the College of Psychiatry TMS course in Singapore. He gained proficiency in advanced neurostimulation at Black Dog Institute (Sydney) and Toronto Western Hospital (Canada). He chairs the Singapore ECT and Neurostimulation Society and serves as treasurer for the International Society of Neurostimulation. He is the Principal Investigator for the APIC-TMS and SPARK-D clinical trials.
doctors_data.university: NUS / Black Dog Institute (Sydney) / Toronto Western Hospital

name: Promises Healthcare
description_long: Promises Healthcare is Singapore's premier private mental health treatment center and the only private provider of TMS therapy in Singapore. Founded in 2011 by Dr. Munidasa Winslow, a pioneer in addiction medicine in the Asia-Pacific region, the center offers NeuroStar TMS Therapy along with psychotherapy, counseling, couples therapy, creative therapies, psychodrama, and specialized addiction therapy. Located at Novena Medical Center, the multidisciplinary team includes psychiatrists, psychologists, therapists, and executive coaches.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Munidasa Winslow
doctors_data.title: Founder & Senior Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Munidasa Winslow founded Promises Healthcare in 2011 and is renowned internationally as an expert in addiction and impulse control disorders. Before founding Promises, he served as Chief of the Addiction Medicine Department at the Institute of Mental Health (IMH). He has worked in general psychiatry and addiction medicine at IMH since 1988 and is a pioneer in addiction and impulse control disorders in the Asia-Pacific region.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Sean David Vanniasingham
doctors_data.title: Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.qualifications: MBBS (NUS), MRCPsych (Royal College of Psychiatrists, UK)
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Sean David Vanniasingham is a consultant psychiatrist experienced in general psychiatry, addiction medicine, and neurostimulation treatment. He graduated from the National University of Singapore and attained his post-graduate degree from the Royal College of Psychiatrists. He previously practiced at IMH and the National Addictions Management Service (NAMS).
doctors_data.university: National University of Singapore / Royal College of Psychiatrists, UK

name: Khoo Teck Puat Hospital (KTPH) - Psychological Medicine
description_long: Khoo Teck Puat Hospital (KTPH) offers TMS therapy through its Department of Psychological Medicine. The department provides comprehensive assessment and management of mental health conditions with a multidisciplinary team of psychiatrists and case managers. KTPH accepts external referrals for rTMS from psychiatrists across both public and private healthcare institutions. The TMS service is supervised by trained TMS nurses working under psychiatrist oversight.

name: National University Hospital (NUH) - Psychological Medicine
description_long: The Department of Psychological Medicine at the National University Hospital (NUH) provides specialized psychiatric services including neuromodulation therapies. NUH's Yong Loo Lin School of Medicine collaborates with IMH on groundbreaking personalised TMS research for treatment-resistant depression. The department offers comprehensive mental health programs and specialized services.

name: Gleneagles Hospital - Dr. Christopher Chan
description_long: Gleneagles Hospital in Singapore offers rTMS therapy through Dr. Christopher Chan Yi Wen, a psychiatrist specializing in the management and treatment of mood disorders with experience in repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation. The hospital, part of Parkway Pantai, is one of Singapore's leading private hospitals providing comprehensive psychiatric care.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Christopher Chan Yi Wen
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Christopher Chan is a psychiatrist practicing at Gleneagles Hospital (Mount Elizabeth Novena) who specializes in the management and treatment of mood disorders with experience in repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS).

name: Private Space Medical - Novena Specialist Center
description_long: Private Space Medical is a psychiatric clinic located at Novena Specialist Center in Singapore. Their psychiatrists and therapists have experience working in renowned hospitals including Singapore General Hospital (SGH) and KK Women's and Children's Hospital (KKH), offering comprehensive mental health services in a private, comfortable setting.

name: German Neuroscience Center
description_long: The German Neuroscience Center is the leading center for TMS in Dubai with nearly 20 years of experience providing cutting-edge neurological, psychiatric, and psychological therapies. With three branches across Dubai (Healthcare City, Jumeirah Lake Towers, and Business Bay), the center employs TMS-certified specialists who evaluate patients' medical histories and symptoms to determine optimal TMS treatment protocols. The center is staffed by internationally trained neurologists, psychiatrists, and psychologists.
address: Dubai Healthcare City, Building 64, Al Razi, Block A, 2006

additional_locations.name: GNC - Jumeirah Lake Towers
additional_locations.address: Jumeirah Lake Towers, Cluster I, Platinum Tower 2806, Dubai

additional_locations.name: GNC - Business Bay
additional_locations.address: Business Bay, Bayview Tower 1701, Marasi Drive, Dubai

doctors_data.name: Prof. Dr. Peter Rieckmann
doctors_data.title: Consultant Neurologist
doctors_data.bio: Senior neurologist at the German Neuroscience Center with extensive experience in neurology and neuromodulation therapies.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Harry Horgan
doctors_data.title: Clinical Psychologist
doctors_data.qualifications: MSc Health Psychology (University of Ulster, Ireland), DClinPsy (University of East London, UK)
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Harry Horgan is a UK-trained Clinical Psychologist with work experience across diverse mental health and specialist psychology services in Ireland and the United Kingdom.
doctors_data.university: University of Ulster / University of East London

name: Novomed Mental Health (NovOMind)
description_long: Novomed is one of the leading medical centres offering transcranial magnetic stimulation (TMS) in Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and Al Ain. Their NovOMind Mental Health division provides a safe, well-tailored, and non-invasive TMS procedure performed by eminent psychiatry and psychology specialists. The center treats both adults and children for all types of mental health conditions.
address: Marina Plaza, 30th Floor, Al Marsa Street, Dubai Marina

doctors_data.name: Dr. Hanan Hussein
doctors_data.title: Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Consultant Psychiatrist at Novomed Mental Health specializing in comprehensive psychiatric assessment and TMS therapy for mood disorders and treatment-resistant conditions.

name: American Wellness Center - Dubai Healthcare City
description_long: The American Wellness Center in Dubai Healthcare City offers advanced TMS therapy with state-of-the-art machinery and equipment. Their board-certified psychiatrists specialize in anxiety and mood disorders, with multidisciplinary collaboration between psychiatrists, psychologists, and wellness specialists. TMS sessions typically last 30 to 40 minutes with no sedation required. The center offers TMS combined with psychotherapy for enhanced outcomes.

name: Emirates Hospital Clinic - Dubai Marina (The London Psychiatry Centre)
description_long: Emirates Hospital Clinic in Dubai Marina, in partnership with The London Psychiatry Centre, has introduced the first repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (rTMS) based liaison service in the world. The London Psychiatry Centre was the first clinic in the UK to offer rTMS treatment. Their rTMS therapy has shown a 61-66% remission rate, significantly outperforming other dTMS providers.
address: Al Habtoor Business Tower, Dubai Marina

doctors_data.name: Dr. Andy Zamar
doctors_data.title: Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Andy Zamar is a renowned psychiatrist from The London Psychiatry Centre who offers expert psychiatric services at the Emirates Hospital Dubai Marina clinic. He is a pioneer of rTMS treatment in the UK and focuses on innovative, evidence-based treatments for mental wellness.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Tina Temelkovska
doctors_data.title: Specialist Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Tina Temelkovska is a respected psychiatrist at Emirates Hospitals Group in Dubai specializing in CBT, EMDR therapy, transcranial current stimulation (tCS), and VR therapy. She provides comprehensive diagnoses and personalized treatment plans for various mental health conditions.

name: Openminds Psychiatry, Counselling & Neuroscience Centre
description_long: Openminds Psychiatry, Counselling & Neuroscience Centre in Dubai offers Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) therapy as a non-invasive, drug-free treatment that helps activate underactive areas of the brain linked to mood, motivation, and emotional balance. Located in The One Tower, Tecom, the center is led by Medical Director Dr. Sankara Sreenivas Kuchibatla and provides comprehensive psychiatric, psychological, and neuroscience services.
address: The One Tower, Suite 904-905, Tecom, Al Barsha

doctors_data.name: Dr. Sankara Sreenivas Kuchibatla
doctors_data.title: Medical Director & Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Sankara Sreenivas Kuchibatla is the Medical Director and Consultant Psychiatrist at Openminds Centre, Dubai. He leads the clinic's comprehensive psychiatric and neuroscience services including TMS therapy, QEEG assessment, and neurofeedback.

name: Mediclinic Deira
description_long: Mediclinic Deira is a state-of-the-art medical facility in Dubai offering TMS therapy for depression through its psychiatry department. Located in the City Centre Deira offices building adjacent to the Pullman Hotel, the clinic provides multispecialty outpatient care with expert physicians, experienced nursing staff, and on-site diagnostic imaging and pharmacy.
address: City Centre Deira Offices Building, Port Saeed

doctors_data.name: Dr. Abdulrazek Saiyed
doctors_data.title: Specialist Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Abdulrazek Saiyed is a Specialist Psychiatrist at Mediclinic Deira providing TMS therapy for depression along with comprehensive psychiatric care.

name: Aspris Wellbeing Centre (formerly Priory Wellbeing Centre)
description_long: Aspris Wellbeing Centre (formerly known as Priory Wellbeing Centre) is a state-of-the-art mental health clinic in Dubai's City Walk area. The centre is staffed by psychiatrists, psychologists, and counsellors led by Dr. Rasha Bassim, a qualified TMS therapist since 2014. Aspris offers comprehensive mental health treatment from anxiety and depression to more complex conditions, with locations in Dubai and Abu Dhabi.
address: City Walk, Al Wasl and Al Safa Road Junction

doctors_data.name: Dr. Rasha Bassim
doctors_data.title: Lead Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.qualifications: MD, Specialist in Psychiatry, Qualified TMS Therapist (2014)
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Rasha Bassim is the lead consultant psychiatrist at Aspris Wellbeing Centre Dubai. She is a qualified transcranial magnetic stimulation (TMS) therapist since 2014 and leads the multidisciplinary team of psychiatrists, psychologists, and counsellors at the centre.

name: Beautiful Mind Medical Center (BMMC)
description_long: Beautiful Mind Medical Center (BMMC) is a premier mental health facility in Abu Dhabi founded in 2018 by Dr. Abdulnaser Arida, a distinguished consultant psychiatrist with over 25 years of experience. The center offers expert psychiatry, psychology, and TMS therapy using the state-of-the-art MagVenture system. TMS effectively addresses depression, OCD, anxiety, and addiction at BMMC.
address: Sultan Bin Zayed The First Street, Al Muntazah, Zone 1

doctors_data.name: Dr. Abdulnaser Arida
doctors_data.title: Founder & Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.qualifications: MD (University of Aleppo, Syria), Arab Board of Medical Specialization in Psychiatry, Member of American Psychiatric Association
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Abdulnaser Arida is a distinguished consultant psychiatrist with over 25 years of expertise. He previously served as Head of the Adult General Psychiatry Clinic at Sheikh Khalifa Medical City (SKMC) in Abu Dhabi, where he led undergraduate medical training and CME programs. He founded Beautiful Mind Medical Center in 2018 to provide comprehensive, evidence-based psychiatric care.

name: Ospedale San Raffaele - MAGICS Center
description_long: The MAGICS (MAGnetic IntraCerebral Stimulation) Center at IRCCS Ospedale San Raffaele is a leading neuromodulation research and clinical center within the Institute of Experimental Neurology. The center conducts pioneering TMS research for multiple sclerosis, chronic neuropathic pain, migraines, Alzheimer's disease, fatigue, depression, and stroke rehabilitation. San Raffaele is one of Italy's most prestigious research hospitals, and the MAGICS Center represents its commitment to advancing non-invasive brain stimulation therapies.
machines: Transcranial Magnetic Stimulator (clinical and research grade)

doctors_data.name: Prof. Letizia Leocani
doctors_data.title: Associate Professor of Neurology, Director of MAGICS Center
doctors_data.bio: Associate Professor of Neurology at Vita-Salute San Raffaele University and Director of the Neurorehabilitation Unit and the MAGICS Center at IRCCS San Raffaele Hospital. After obtaining her MD in Milan and PhD in Human Physiology, she specialized in Neurology and was a Visiting Research Fellow at the National Institutes of Health in Bethesda, Maryland. Her research focuses on non-invasive neurostimulation including TMS and tDCS for central nervous system diseases.

name: Fondazione Santa Lucia IRCCS
description_long: Fondazione Santa Lucia IRCCS is the leading research center in Italy and among the top five in the world for TMS research, preceded only by University College London, Harvard University, National Institutes of Health, and University of Toronto. The center's Experimental Neuropsychophysiology Laboratory employs transcranial magnetic stimulation and transcranial direct current stimulation techniques for research and clinical applications. Groundbreaking studies here have demonstrated that TMS can slow Alzheimer's disease progression by 52% and significantly improve memory, stroke recovery, and cognitive function.

doctors_data.name: Prof. Giacomo Koch
doctors_data.title: Research Director, Director of Non-Invasive Brain Stimulation Laboratory
doctors_data.bio: Neurologist and Research Director at Fondazione Santa Lucia IRCCS since 2006, and Professor of Physiology at the University of Ferrara since 2020. Among the top 10 international experts in transcranial magnetic stimulation. His research focuses on clinical neurophysiology of the motor system and cognitive functions, with over 469 publications and 21,691 citations. Led the landmark study showing 52% slowing of Alzheimer's progression with TMS treatment.

name: Healthy Brain Institute
description_long: The Healthy Brain Institute is a cutting-edge Italian center dedicated to brain health, specializing in Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS). The institute offers non-pharmacological treatment based on the application of electromagnetic fields capable of acting on brain areas whose functioning is altered by certain pathologies. TMS has been shown to be extremely effective for treating mood depression, substance abuse and alcohol dependence, and chronic pain.

doctors_data.name: Prof. Giacomo Koch
doctors_data.title: Scientific Advisor, Neurologist
doctors_data.university: University of Ferrara / Fondazione Santa Lucia IRCCS
doctors_data.bio: World-renowned expert in TMS and non-invasive brain stimulation, also affiliated with Fondazione Santa Lucia IRCCS. His leadership at the Healthy Brain Institute bridges advanced neuroscience research with clinical TMS practice in Rome.

name: Brain Stimulation Italia - Mood Center Milano
description_long: Brain Stimulation Italia operates advanced TMS treatment centers offering rTMS, tDCS, and Deep rTMS therapies. The Milan Mood Center, located in the Navigli area, specializes in treating psychiatric disorders including depression, eating disorders, substance dependencies, OCD, bipolar disorder, and chronic pain without hospitalization. Scientific studies demonstrate that the technology used leads to improvement in 85% of cases, with over 80% of patients completing the therapy cycle successfully overcoming their conditions. Treatment cycles consist of 20 sessions lasting 20 minutes each.

doctors_data.name: Dott. Giuseppe Fazzari
doctors_data.title: Scientific Director, Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Psychiatrist with 40 years of experience, Scientific Director of Brain Stimulation Italia. Former Director of the Psychiatry Unit 23 at Montichiari Hospital for 25 years. Leads the clinical application of rTMS and other brain stimulation therapies for psychiatric disorders and addiction treatment.

doctors_data.name: Dott.ssa Maria Chiara De Vivo
doctors_data.title: Clinical Coordinator, Milan Center
doctors_data.bio: Coordinates the multidisciplinary team of psychiatrists, psychologists, and technicians at the Milan Mood Center, overseeing patient care and treatment protocols for brain stimulation therapies.

name: Brain Stimulation Italia - Mood Center Brescia
description_long: Brain Stimulation Italia's Brescia center is located within Poliambulatorio PTC and offers the same advanced rTMS, tDCS, and Deep rTMS treatments as the Milan center. Under the scientific direction of Dr. Giuseppe Fazzari, the center provides non-invasive brain stimulation for psychiatric disorders, addiction, and chronic pain. The Brescia location was among the first Brain Stimulation Italia centers established.
address: c/o Poliambulatorio PTC, Via Fratelli Ugoni, 2

doctors_data.name: Dott. Giuseppe Fazzari
doctors_data.title: Scientific Director, Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Psychiatrist with 40 years of experience and Scientific Director of Brain Stimulation Italia. Leads clinical operations and treatment protocols at the Brescia Mood Center.

name: Brain&Care Milano
description_long: Brain&Care is a specialized clinic for the treatment of dependencies and mental wellness, offering Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) as a non-invasive brain stimulation therapy. Led by Prof. Antonello Bonci, a world authority in addiction treatment, the clinic's team of psychiatrists, psychologists, and technicians provides cutting-edge diagnosis and treatment for psychiatric and neurological disorders. Brain&Care adopts evidence-based protocols combining TMS with comprehensive psychological support.

doctors_data.name: Prof. Antonello Bonci
doctors_data.title: Scientific Director
doctors_data.bio: World authority in the treatment of addiction disorders and one of the leading experts in the TMS field. Scientific Director of Brain&Care, leading an international team of medical professionals, psychologists, and technicians with consolidated experience in neuroscience and mental health.

name: Brain&Care Torino
description_long: Brain&Care Torino, located within the CDC Kormed healthcare facility on Piazza Statuto, offers TMS therapy for addiction and mental health disorders in Turin. The clinic provides the same evidence-based Brain&Care protocols for brain stimulation combined with comprehensive psychological care, serving the Piedmont region.

name: Brain&Care Rimini
description_long: Brain&Care Rimini provides TMS therapy and mental wellness services on Corso d'Augusto in the heart of Rimini. The clinic offers non-invasive brain stimulation treatments for addiction and psychiatric disorders, serving the Emilia-Romagna region with the Brain&Care evidence-based treatment approach.

name: Istituto Auxologico Italiano - rTMS Milano
description_long: Istituto Auxologico Italiano is a prestigious IRCCS (research hospital) in Milan offering repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) and transcranial direct current stimulation (tDCS/sDCS) within its Department of Neurorehabilitative Sciences. The rTMS rehabilitation programs are applied as an advanced non-invasive brain stimulation technique for motor and cognitive disorders and rare forms of chronic pain. Treatment is available at multiple Auxologico locations in Milan including Capitanio, Procaccini, and Pier Lombardo.

doctors_data.name: Prof. Luigi Tesio
doctors_data.title: Director, Department of Neurorehabilitative Sciences
doctors_data.bio: Physiotherapist and Director of the Department of Neurorehabilitative Sciences at Istituto Auxologico Italiano, overseeing the rTMS and tDCS treatment programs for motor and cognitive rehabilitation.

name: Casa di Cura Parco dei Tigli
description_long: Casa di Cura Parco dei Tigli is a private neuropsychiatric clinic in Teolo (Padova province) offering TMS therapy among its comprehensive mental health services. The clinic provides both SSN-accredited and private hospitalization for neuropsychiatric conditions, with a serene parkland setting in the Euganean Hills area near Padova.

name: Brainclinics Foundation
description_long: Research Institute Brainclinics was founded in 2001 as an independent research institute in Nijmegen, specializing in advancing our understanding of the brain through applied neuroscience. Brainclinics was the first in Europe to treat depression with TMS in an outpatient setting. Their expertise extends to the development and application of brain stimulation techniques including rTMS for depression and OCD, TMS-induced Heart-Brain Coupling, and EEG-based precision psychiatry. The institute also organizes the annual TMS Masterclass and Certification Course, accredited by the Dutch-Flemish Brain Stimulation Foundation.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Martijn Arns
doctors_data.title: Founder and Director, Associate Professor
doctors_data.university: Utrecht University (PhD), Maastricht University (Associate Professor), Visiting Scholar at Stanford University
doctors_data.bio: Biological-psychologist and entrepreneur who founded Brainclinics in 2001. Received his PhD at Utrecht University on EEG-based personalized medicine for ADHD and depression. Specialized in neurobiological aspects of ADHD and depression, stratified psychiatry, biomarkers, and neuromodulation techniques such as TMS. Over 190 scientific publications and four patents. Currently a visiting scholar at Stanford University's Brain Stimulation Lab.

name: Neurowave Amsterdam
description_long: Neurowave is a specialized practice in Amsterdam's Jordaan neighborhood offering innovative, evidence-based rTMS therapy for patients with depression and obsessive-compulsive disorder (OCD). The multidisciplinary team includes a psychiatrist, two GZ-psychologists, three psychologists, and a neurobiologist. Intake appointments are generally possible within 1 to 2 weeks. The treatment is reimbursed by Dutch health insurers.

name: Amsterdam UMC - rTMS Psychiatry
description_long: Amsterdam UMC (located at VUmc campus) offers rTMS as a scientifically proven, effective, and safe treatment for depression, reimbursed by Dutch health insurers since 2017. The Department of Psychiatry provides rTMS in combination with psychotherapy, typically 20 to 30 sessions over 5 to 12 weeks. As a leading academic medical center, Amsterdam UMC conducts cutting-edge research on brain stimulation therapies alongside clinical treatment.

name: GGZ inGeest - Neuromodulation
description_long: GGZ inGeest offers rTMS and ECT neuromodulation treatments for patients with treatment-resistant depression and bipolar depression. The center combines research with regular treatment, currently studying the effectiveness of rTMS for depressive symptoms in bipolar disorder. Approximately 30% of clients with treatment-resistant depression achieve full remission after a complete rTMS treatment course. The treatment is covered by Dutch health insurance.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Eric van Exel
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist, Lead Investigator Neuromodulation
doctors_data.bio: Psychiatrist with expertise in neuromodulation and rTMS for treatment-resistant depression. Lead investigator for the T-Bide study on rTMS effectiveness for depressive symptoms in bipolar disorder at GGZ inGeest.

name: rTMS International Rotterdam
description_long: rTMS International is one of the Netherlands' leading dedicated rTMS treatment providers with over 10 years of experience. The Rotterdam clinic, located on 's-Gravendijkwal, offers combined rTMS and psychotherapy for depression and obsessive-compulsive disorder. The clinic has a dedicated team of psychologists and psychiatrists specialized in integrating brain stimulation with talk therapy for optimal outcomes.

name: TMS Center Europe
description_long: TMS Center Europe specializes in effective, medication-free rTMS treatment for depression and obsessive-compulsive disorder (OCS/OCD). Based in Rotterdam, the center provides evidence-based rTMS programs combined with psychotherapy. The center serves patients from across Europe and offers treatment in both Dutch and English.

name: neurocare Clinics Amsterdam
description_long: neurocare Clinics Amsterdam is part of the international neurocare group network, offering combined treatment of psychotherapy with rTMS magnetic brain stimulation for depressive disorders and OCD. The clinic uses evidence-based protocols including rTMS, neurofeedback, tDCS, and QEEG brain mapping. Since May 2024, rTMS combined with psychotherapy is officially recommended in the updated Dutch multidisciplinary guideline for Depression.

name: neurocare Clinics Den Haag
description_long: neurocare Clinics Den Haag, situated on the prestigious Lange Voorhout in The Hague, offers rTMS therapy combined with psychotherapy for depression and OCD. The clinic provides a comprehensive suite of neuromodulation services including rTMS, neurofeedback, tDCS, QEEG brain mapping, and actigraphy sleep assessments. Located 15 minutes walking distance from Den Haag Centraal station.

doctors_data.name: Els Graafsma
doctors_data.title: Clinical Psychologist / Psychotherapist
doctors_data.bio: Klinisch psycholoog and psychotherapeut at neurocare Clinics Den Haag, specializing in combined rTMS and psychotherapy treatment for depression and OCD.

name: neurocare Clinics Groningen
description_long: neurocare Clinics Groningen offers combined rTMS and psychotherapy treatment for depression and OCD in the northern Netherlands. As part of the neurocare group network with eight locations across the Netherlands, the Groningen clinic provides evidence-based brain stimulation therapies alongside comprehensive psychological support.

name: UMC Groningen - Universitair Centrum Psychiatrie
description_long: The Universitair Centrum Psychiatrie (UCP) at UMC Groningen provides rTMS through its Innovative Psychiatric Unit (IPU), offering specialized treatments for patients whose psychological complaints respond insufficiently to regular therapies. As an academic medical center, UMCG combines clinical rTMS treatment with innovative research including esketamine and VR therapy approaches.

name: neurocare Clinics Nijmegen
description_long: neurocare Clinics Nijmegen is one of eight neurocare locations in the Netherlands, offering combined rTMS and psychotherapy treatment. Located on Bijleveldsingel in the historic center of Nijmegen, the clinic provides comprehensive neuromodulation services in collaboration with the nearby Brainclinics Foundation research institute.

name: Tokyo Yokohama TMS Clinic - Minato Tokyo
name_ja: 東京横浜TMSクリニック みなと東京院
description_long: Tokyo Yokohama TMS Clinic is one of Japan's leading TMS-specialized clinics, operated by Medical Corporation Cocoromi. With over 1,000 TMS cases per year and registered as one of the top-volume TMS providers across 20 major universities and 57 medical institutions in Japan, the clinic offers evidence-based rTMS therapy optimized for each patient. Insurance-covered rTMS treatment has been available since June 2019. The Minato Tokyo branch serves the Tamachi/Mita area of central Tokyo.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Takeshi Ohnishi
doctors_data.title: Director / Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Leads the Tokyo Yokohama TMS Clinic network with extensive clinical experience in rTMS therapy. Oversees one of Japan's largest TMS treatment databases, contributing to national TMS research consortiums including TReC-J.

name: Brain Clinic Tokyo
name_ja: ブレインクリニック東京
description_long: Brain Clinic is a psychiatry clinic in Tokyo specializing in QEEG (Quantitative Electroencephalography) diagnostics and TMS therapy. Based on the latest neuroscience, they provide diagnostic and treatment services for developmental disorders (ADHD/ASD), panic disorder, anxiety disorders, sleep disorders, PTSD, and autonomic nervous system disorders. Founded by Dr. Yu Kawaguchi, the clinic operates locations in Nihonbashi (Tokyo Station area) and Shinjuku.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Yu Kawaguchi
doctors_data.title: Founder / Director
doctors_data.bio: Founder of Brain Clinic, specializing in neuroscience-based diagnostic and treatment approaches. Pioneered the combination of QEEG brain mapping with personalized TMS treatment protocols in Japan.

name: Tokyo TMS Mindfulness Clinic
name_ja: 東京TMSマインドフルネスクリニック
description_long: Tokyo TMS Mindfulness Clinic is one of Tokyo's few TMS-specialized medical facilities. The clinic focuses on treating depression symptoms, insomnia, and ADHD without relying on medication, offering root-cause treatment through brain-function improvement. The clinic emphasizes smart treatment scheduling, easy reservations, and transparent pricing to make TMS therapy accessible to working professionals.

doctors_data.name: Director (Name not publicly listed)
doctors_data.title: Medical Director / Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Leads the Tokyo TMS Mindfulness Clinic, providing specialized TMS treatment with physician aftercare follow-up for depression, insomnia, and ADHD.

name: Besli Clinic Tokyo
name_ja: ベスリクリニック東京
description_long: Besli Clinic Tokyo is a psychosomatic medicine clinic for working professionals, located 1 minute from Kanda Station. Since 2017, the clinic has been a pioneer in TMS therapy in Japan, with over 5,000 cumulative TMS treatment cases across the Besli Group. The clinic combines TMS therapy with Kampo (Chinese herbal medicine) and counseling for relapse prevention, and all physicians have experience as occupational health doctors.
address: Kanda Kajimachi 3-2, Kanda Sanmi Building 8F, Chiyoda-ku, Tokyo

doctors_data.name: Dr. Takagi
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist / Occupational Health Doctor
doctors_data.bio: Psychiatrist at Besli Clinic with occupational health experience. Provides TMS treatment combined with Kampo medicine and counseling for working professionals experiencing depression and burnout.

name: Shimokitazawa Psychosomatic Medical Clinic
name_ja: 下北沢心療内科クリニック
description_long: Shimokitazawa Psychosomatic Medical Clinic is a psychosomatic medicine, psychiatry, and TMS treatment clinic in the Shimokitazawa area of Setagaya, Tokyo. The clinic offers English-language TMS consultations and treatment, making it accessible to international patients. TMS has been FDA-approved since 2008 and MHLW-approved in Japan since 2018. The clinic also offers herbal medicine (Kampo) as part of its holistic treatment approach.
address: Kitazawa 2-10-15, Shimokitazawa High Town 4F, Setagaya-ku, Tokyo

doctors_data.name: Director (English Available)
doctors_data.title: Director / Psychiatrist
doctors_data.specialty: TMS Therapy, Kampo Medicine, Psychosomatic Medicine
doctors_data.bio: Provides TMS treatment and herbal medicine in Shimokitazawa with English-language support for international patients. Part of a psychiatric network collaborating on brain disease treatment.

name: National Center Hospital of Neurology and Psychiatry (NCNP)
name_ja: 国立精神・神経医療研究センター病院
description_long: The National Center Hospital of Neurology and Psychiatry (NCNP) is one of Japan's five National Medical Research Centers, affiliated with the Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare. The hospital provides patient-centered care for psychiatric, neurological, muscular, and developmental diseases with 486 inpatient beds. The Integrative Brain Imaging Center conducts active TMS and rTMS research, and the Department of Psychiatry provides evidence-based treatment for schizophrenia, mood disorders, dementia, sleep disorders, dependence, and epilepsy.

doctors_data.name: NCNP Psychiatry Faculty
doctors_data.title: Department of Psychiatry
doctors_data.university: National Center of Neurology and Psychiatry
doctors_data.bio: The Department of Psychiatry at NCNP provides evidence-based diagnoses and treatment plans using biological, psychological, and environmental assessments. Active research in TMS-EEG and neural oscillation modulation.

name: Ginza Psychosomatic Medicine Clinic
name_ja: 銀座心療内科クリニック
description_long: Ginza Psychosomatic Medicine Clinic is a mental health clinic located 2 minutes from Ginza Station (A3 exit), next to GINZA SIX. The clinic provides TMS treatment using the NeuroStar system and offers comprehensive psychiatric care. The clinic's TMS program is informed by FDA data showing 78% clinically significant symptom improvement in patients treated with the NeuroStar device.
address: Ginza 5-9-13, Ginza Kikumasa Building 3F, Chuo-ku, Tokyo

doctors_data.name: Clinic Director
doctors_data.title: Director / Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Director of Ginza Psychosomatic Medicine Clinic, providing TMS treatment with the NeuroStar system in central Ginza. Offers comprehensive mental health care in a convenient location for working professionals.

name: Asakayama Hospital - rTMS Treatment Center
name_ja: 浅香山病院 rTMS治療室
description_long: Asakayama Hospital is a comprehensive hospital in Sakai, Osaka with 100 years of psychiatric care history. The hospital introduced insurance-covered rTMS treatment in January 2020, shortly after national insurance approval. As of March 2025, the hospital has treated 48 patients with a remarkable 52% remission rate. The rTMS team consists of multiple physicians, nurses, and clinical psychologists. Asakayama Hospital is a founding member of the Kansai TMS Network alongside Osaka Medical and Pharmaceutical University, Kansai Medical University, Hannan Hospital, and Wakayama Medical University.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Shun Takahashi
doctors_data.title: rTMS Lead Physician
doctors_data.university: Osaka University Graduate School of Medicine, Department of Psychiatry (Lecturer)
doctors_data.bio: Specialist in brain stimulation therapy and mood disorders. Serves as a member of the Japanese Society of Psychiatry and Neurology's rTMS Appropriate Use Guidelines Working Group, the Japanese Society of Mood Disorders' Neuromodulation Committee, and co-representative of the Kansai TMS Network. Also serves as Special Deputy Director of Asakayama Hospital's Clinical Research Training Center.

name: A&O Mental Clinic Osaka Nakatsu
description_long: A&O Mental Clinic (formerly Wako Psychiatric Clinic) is a psychosomatic medicine, psychiatry, and child psychiatry clinic in the Umeda/Nakatsu area of Osaka. The clinic has introduced TMS as a non-invasive treatment for depression that stimulates the cerebral cortex, offering a good balance of safety and efficacy without medication side effects. The clinic also provides child psychiatry services for patients aged junior high school and above.
address: Toyosaki 3-13-6, Fuji Terrace Osaka Umeda 3F, Kita-ku, Osaka

doctors_data.name: Clinic Director
doctors_data.title: Director / Psychiatrist
doctors_data.specialty: TMS Therapy, Child Psychiatry, Psychosomatic Medicine
doctors_data.bio: Director of A&O Mental Clinic in Osaka, providing TMS treatment and child/adolescent psychiatric care in the Umeda area. Offers magnetic stimulation therapy as a non-invasive alternative to medication for depression.

name: Seoul Psychiatry Gangnam
description_long: Seoul Psychiatry Gangnam is a leading English-speaking psychiatric clinic in Seoul's Gangnam district, specializing in rTMS therapy for international patients. Led by Dr. Paul J. Woo, the clinic treats over 200 international patients annually and uses the BrainsWay Deep TMS system, which is FDA-approved and targets deeper brain structures than conventional surface rTMS. Located 1 minute from Seolleung Station Exit 7, the clinic offers same-week consultations for international patients with treatment plans integrating psychotherapy, brain stimulation, and medication management.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Paul J. Woo
doctors_data.title: Lead Psychiatrist
doctors_data.specialty: Mood Disorders, Anxiety Disorders, rTMS Therapy, International Patient Mental Health
doctors_data.university: Johns Hopkins University (MPH), University of Maryland Mood and Anxiety Disorders Program
doctors_data.bio: Board-certified psychiatrist with over 10 years of clinical experience. Earned Master of Public Health from Johns Hopkins University and trained at the University of Maryland's Mood and Anxiety Disorders Program. Certified Teacher at SIYLI (Search Inside Yourself Leadership Institute, developed at Google). Treats 200+ international patients annually with refined rTMS protocols specifically for English-speaking patients.

name: Gangnam Severance Hospital - Department of Psychiatry
description_long: Gangnam Severance Hospital, established in 1983 as part of Yonsei University Health System (YUHS), is a major tertiary hospital in Gangnam, Seoul. The Department of Psychiatry has been a leader in Korean psychiatry since 1923, providing cutting-edge treatment through virtual reality therapy rooms, magnetic stimulation (TMS), and neurofeedback therapy. The department has conducted clinical trials on accelerated rTMS protocols for major depressive disorder and continues innovative neuromodulation research.

doctors_data.name: Gangnam Severance Psychiatry Faculty
doctors_data.title: Department of Psychiatry, Yonsei University College of Medicine
doctors_data.bio: The Psychiatry Department of Gangnam Severance Hospital is affiliated with Yonsei University College of Medicine. Has conducted clinical trials on accelerated, conventional, and sham rTMS for treating major depressive disorder, with published research in international journals.

name: Seoul St. Mary's Hospital - TMS Clinic
description_long: Seoul St. Mary's Hospital, the representative teaching hospital of the Catholic University of Korea's College of Medicine, was the first in South Korea to introduce rTMS in its psychiatry department. The Brain Stimulation Clinic (경두개자기자극 클리닉) provides comprehensive TMS treatment programs including drug treatment, psychotherapy, cognitive behavioral therapy, meditation, and brain stimulation therapy. The hospital has published clinical research on both standard and miniaturized rTMS devices for depression, as well as rTMS for PTSD.

doctors_data.name: Seoul St. Mary's Psychiatry Faculty
doctors_data.title: Department of Psychiatry, Catholic University of Korea
doctors_data.university: Catholic University of Korea College of Medicine
doctors_data.bio: Pioneered rTMS introduction in Korean psychiatry. Conducted clinical research on miniaturized rTMS efficacy (54 patients with unipolar MDD, 2015-2016) and low-frequency rTMS for PTSD treatment. The department integrates brain stimulation with CBT, meditation, and pharmacotherapy.

name: Samsung Medical Center - Department of Psychiatry
description_long: Samsung Medical Center (SMC) is a premier tertiary hospital in Gangnam-gu, Seoul, with over 1,000 doctors and 8 specialized centers.
