The Department of Psychiatry offers neuromodulation as a core treatment modality alongside pharmacotherapy, digital therapeutics, and transdiagnostic psychosocial interventions. SMC's Neuroscience Center conducts advanced research across neurology and psychiatry, making it one of Korea's leading centers for brain stimulation therapies.

doctors_data.name: Samsung Medical Center Psychiatry Faculty
doctors_data.title: Department of Psychiatry
doctors_data.bio: The Psychiatry Department at Samsung Medical Center provides comprehensive mental health care through evidence-based approaches including neuromodulation, pharmacotherapy, digital therapeutics, and transdiagnostic psychosocial interventions.

name: Brain Treatment Center Seoul - Hoegi
description_long: Brain Treatment Center Seoul (Hoegi location) provides MeRT (Magnetic e-Resonance Therapy), a personalized form of TMS that uses qEEG brain mapping to tailor treatment protocols for each individual. The center treats conditions including PTSD, traumatic brain injury, depression, autism, and supports sports recovery. MeRT combines the precision of qEEG diagnostics with customized TMS protocols, targeting specific brain regions based on individual brainwave patterns.

doctors_data.name: BTC Seoul Clinical Team
doctors_data.title: MeRT Specialists
doctors_data.bio: The Brain Treatment Center Seoul team provides personalized MeRT therapy using qEEG brain mapping to create individualized TMS protocols. Part of the global Brain Treatment Center network with locations in the US and Asia.

name: Bundang Seoul National University Hospital - TMS Center
description_long: Bundang Seoul National University Hospital (SNUBH), the largest hospital in Gyeonggi Province, is affiliated with Seoul National University College of Medicine. The Department of Neuropsychiatry operates a Brain Function Regulation Lab (뇌기능조절실) that provides transcranial magnetic stimulation therapy. The Neuropsychiatry Department includes five major clinics: Mood Disorder Clinic, Geriatric Psychiatry Clinic, Sleep Disorder and Stress Clinic, and Child and Adolescent Psychiatric Clinic.

doctors_data.name: SNUBH Neuropsychiatry Faculty
doctors_data.title: Department of Neuropsychiatry
doctors_data.specialty: Brain Stimulation Therapy, Mood Disorders, Sleep Medicine
doctors_data.university: Seoul National University College of Medicine
doctors_data.bio: The Neuropsychiatry Department at Bundang Seoul National University Hospital operates the Brain Function Regulation Lab providing TMS therapy. Offers bio-feedback, light treatment, and cognitive rehabilitation alongside brain stimulation therapies.

name: Asan Medical Center - Department of Rehabilitation Medicine
description_long: Asan Medical Center is South Korea's largest hospital and the teaching hospital of the University of Ulsan College of Medicine. The Department of Rehabilitation Medicine has extensive experience using repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) for neurological recovery, including post-stroke rehabilitation for dysphagia (swallowing difficulty), dysarthria (speech difficulties), and motor recovery. Clinical studies have been conducted on TMS effects for patients with brain injuries since 2013.

doctors_data.name: Asan Rehabilitation Medicine Faculty
doctors_data.title: Department of Rehabilitation Medicine
doctors_data.specialty: rTMS for Neurological Recovery, Post-Stroke Rehabilitation
doctors_data.university: University of Ulsan College of Medicine
doctors_data.bio: The Department of Rehabilitation Medicine at Asan Medical Center has published multiple studies on rTMS for post-stroke recovery. Clinical research since 2013 demonstrates expertise in using TMS for dysphagia, dysarthria, and motor recovery in brain injury patients.

name: YNK Clinic (Yonsei U&Kim Psychiatry)
description_long: YNK Clinic (Yonsei U&Kim Psychiatry) is a private psychiatric clinic in the Samsung-dong/Daechi-dong area of Gangnam, Seoul, near Samsung and Seolleung stations. The clinic offers TMS (transcranial magnetic stimulation) therapy alongside cognitive behavioral therapy and comprehensive psychiatric care. Led by Director Yoo Sang-woo, the clinic specializes in depression, social anxiety, panic disorder, and adolescent mental health including test anxiety.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Yoo Sang-woo
doctors_data.title: Director / Psychiatrist
doctors_data.specialty: TMS Therapy, CBT, Depression, Anxiety Disorders
doctors_data.bio: Director of YNK Clinic specializing in TMS therapy and cognitive behavioral therapy for depression, social anxiety, panic disorder, and adolescent mental health issues in the Gangnam area of Seoul.
